focusing_orb.description: An iridescent focusing orb. It calms your swirly thoughts, helps you meditate, levitate and fight the enemies of the imagination.

fortifying_gruel.name: Fortifying Gruel
fortifying_gruel.description: One bowl of lumpy fortifying gruel.

fortune.name: Fortune
fortune.description: For those who believe their fate is predetermined, this fortune holds your destiny. Plus, your lucky lottery numbers!

fortune_cookie.name: Fortune Cookie
fortune_cookie.description: Comes with or without a note inside. Add your own and give it to a friend!

fox_bait.name: Fox Bait
fox_bait.description: A nugget of fox-pleasing goodness, filled with every fox's favourite flavours. Proof positive that you catch more foxes with Fox Bait than you do with vinegar (just in case anyone suggested the alternative, which on reflection seems unlikely).

fox_brush.name: Fox Brush
fox_brush.description: One finely crafted Brush for the grooming of fantastic foxes and removing fine Fibers from their bushy tails.

fox_permit.name: Fox-Brushing Permit
fox_permit.description: In order to keep entry to the Fox Brushing Preserves entirely fair and balanced, a permit can be procured directly from the Fox Ranger. Long form birth certificate not currently required for permit procurement.

fried_noodles.name: Fried Noodles
fried_noodles.description: A small slippery hill of fried noodles.

fried_rice.name: Fried Rice
fried_rice.description: A bowl of fried rice with lots of nummy bits.

friendly_acid.name: Friendly Acid
friendly_acid.description: A compound made out of red and blue.

frog_in_a_hole.name: Frog-in-a-Hole
frog_in_a_hole.description: A perfect egg perfectly fried in a perfect hole in a slice of bread.

fruit_changing_machine.name: Fruit Changing Machine
fruit_changing_machine.description: A triple-carbine fruit-changing machine. It will transmogrify cherries into other fruit. This can come in surprisingly handy.

fruity_juice.name: Fruity Juice
fruity_juice.description: A glass of nigh-ambrosial fruit juice.

frying_pan.name: Frying Pan
frying_pan.description: A useful pan for frying things in.

fuel_cell.name: Fuel Cell
fuel_cell.description: Hundreds of tiny power-pellets in each capsule provide gigajoules of energy to fuel the machines.

fuelmaker.name: Fuelmaker
fuelmaker.description: Talk about green energy. There's so much green in these fuel cells, and the Fuelmaker is how it gets there.

fuelmaker_case.name: Fuelmaker Case
fuelmaker_case.description: Placed on an assembled Machine Stand, this Fuelmaker Case makes a good case for a stand to become a Fuelmaker.

fuelmaker_core.name: Fuelmaker Core
fuelmaker_core.description: Install the Fuelmaker core and the final piece of the puzzle will be in place. Now you just need fuel to fuel the Fuelmaker.

fuelmaker_engine.name: Fuelmaker Engine
fuelmaker_engine.description: Install the Fuelmaker Engine and you're one step closer to being able to "Make Fuelmaker go now!"

furniture_armchair.name: Armchair
furniture_armchair.description: A basic armchair. Like a normal chair, but armed. Armed and dangerous. If by "dangerous" you mean "quite uncomfortable."

furniture_bed.name: Bed
furniture_bed.description: Where the magic happens (low-grade magic. Better magic available with upgraded beds. Also: magic not included).

furniture_bench.name: Bench
furniture_bench.description: Too thin to be a coffee table, too low to be a shelf, too long-winded to be a stool, this is a bench. For benching people.

furniture_bookcase.name: Bookcase
furniture_bookcase.description: Rudimentary bookcase, perfect for those who wish to give the impression of intending to read something someday.

furniture_ceilingdeco.name: Hanging Decoration
furniture_ceilingdeco.description: As a piece of modern art, this cutting edge contemporary faux-rustic hanging piece has been called both "a searing socio-religious commentary" and "a ceilingular carbuncle". Which is it? You decide.

furniture_ceilinglamp.name: Ceiling Lamp
furniture_ceilinglamp.description: A small fixture, radiating with an unexplainable dim glow, like the tiny weak sun around which the universe of your house revolves.

furniture_chair.name: Chair
furniture_chair.description: The perfect chair for those who like the idea of sitting briefly and with utmost caution. Upgrading recommended for those who like highfalutin' ideas like "comfort" and "aesthetics".

furniture_coffeetable.name: Coffee Table
furniture_coffeetable.description: A starter table for those who enjoy the concept of resting their brew on an almost flat surface. For those who dream of an *actually* flat one, upgrades are available.

furniture_counter.name: Counter
furniture_counter.description: Why own a counter? Because it is an admirably flat surface, useful for dividing large spaces. (This is known as 'The Counter Argument'. A Counter-Counter Argument exists, but it only confuses everything).

furniture_desk.name: Desk
furniture_desk.description: For those who aspire to life in the bureaucratic hall, even a basic starter desk can induce the feelings of power previously known only to the administrators of Ur.

furniture_door.name: Door
furniture_door.description: That which brings you down can also lift you up. This is true of many things, but never more so than in the case of this magical-handled uppy-downy between-floor-device. Or 'Door'.

furniture_fireplace.name: Fireplace
furniture_fireplace.description: It's a place with fire. Or sometimes without the fire.

furniture_floorlamp.name: Floor Lamp
furniture_floorlamp.description: A basic low-level provider of atmospheric downlighting. Upgrade for downlighting with wider appeal and higher aesthetic appeal.

furniture_loveseat.name: Loveseat
furniture_loveseat.description: A loveseat for those who love seats in a moderate way. For those who really LOVE seats, upgrades to even more loveable seats are available.

furniture_roomdeco.name: Room Decoration
furniture_roomdeco.description: To those with a layman's knowledge of art, this may look like a couple of pieces of wood roughly snailed together. But to those with their mind tuned to higher things (and the possibility of upgradiness) the true inner beauty of the piece reveals itself.

furniture_rug.name: Rug
furniture_rug.description: Most rugs are said to pull the room together because they're aesthetically pleasing. This hardwearing floorcovering literally pulls the room together, because it has its own centre of gravity. Not really. It's just a rug.

furniture_shelf.name: Shelf
furniture_shelf.description: The perfect shelf is longer, stronger and more attractive: this is not that shelf. It's like that shelf. It's shelf-ish. But there's nothing wrong with being a little shelfish.

furniture_sidetable.name: Side Table
furniture_sidetable.description: A side table. For the side. The side of what, no one knows. But that's where it belongs. Not in the centre, and certainly not in the corner. Nobody puts a table in the corner.

furniture_sofa.name: Sofa
furniture_sofa.description: The phrase "sofa: so good" is not about this sofa, which is not, essentially, a good sofa. But with a little upgrading, it could be.

furniture_stool.name: Stool
furniture_stool.description: A deceptively simple construction offering the ability to see through walls. Small segments of wall, at any rate.

furniture_table.name: Table
furniture_table.description: It has four legs, like a pig. It isn't a pig. It's a plain old basic table. Do not nibble it.

furniture_tabledeco.name: Tabletop Decoration
furniture_tabledeco.description: A simple wooden table decoration? Perhaps. But squint a little, and you can see the potential that lies within it. Squint a *little* more, and it kind of looks like a chicken with a hat on. But squint any more than that and you'll get wrinkles. Stop squinting.

furniture_tablelamp.name: Table Lamp
furniture_tablelamp.description: A basic table light, for the lighting of tables. The perfect accessory for those who long to see tables better.

furniture_walldeco.name: Wall Decoration
furniture_walldeco.description: Some would look at this and see an empty frame. Those with more of a creative eye can see the potential that lies within it. Art is in the eye of the beholder: for a wall decoration, doubly so.

furniture_walllamp.name: Wall Lamp
furniture_walllamp.description: For those who require a detailed, well-lit view of a small area of the wall, of anyone standing directly below the lamp, and of the lamp itself. A desirable feature.

game_box.name: Game
game_box.description: This is a tiny box containing a whole imaginary world, created in the minds of 11 Giants. At the bottom, there's a tagline: "Do stuff. In a game." it says. Wow. That's a terrible tag line. Game looks pretty awesome, though.

gameserver.name: Game Server
gameserver.description: A plain old game server. This one is labelled "gs4".

gameshow_ticket.name: Gameshow Ticket
gameshow_ticket.description: One glittery, razzling, dazzling game show ticket. Ain't nothing you can do but USE it.

gammas_pancakes.name: Gamma's Pancake
gammas_pancakes.description: One mouthwatering pancake, just like Gamma used to make.

gandlevery.name: Gandlevery
gandlevery.description: Plant with furry fern-fronds of fleetfooted goodness.

gassifier.name: Gassifier
gassifier.description: An ergonomically correct gassifier. It can turn general vapour into much more exciting gases.

gem_diamond.name: Walloping Big Diamond
gem_diamond.description: Yep, that's a walloping big diamond.

gem_ruby.name: Modestly Sized Ruby
gem_ruby.description: A modestly sized ruby of nonetheless staggering beauty.

general_building_permit.name: General Building Permit
general_building_permit.description: This general (adj.) building (adj.-n.) permit (n.) is quite official and permits (v.), in the general sense, building (v.).

general_fabric.name: General Fabric
general_fabric.description: A coarse fabric necessary in the construction of various basic furniture items. Attractive from a distance, face-to-fabric contact feels uncomfortably like getting up close and personal with the underside of a fox's tail.

general_vapour.name: General Vapour
general_vapour.description: A flask of all-purpose general vapour, harvested from a Gas Plant.

girder.name: Girder
girder.description: A solid metal material used for correctly shafting mines and supporting structures. There's some crazy rumour that if you can find a way to boil these down, you can magically create a sparkling bright orange drink out of them. But this has never been proved, and their use in construction is by far the more popular one.

glitchepoix.name: Glitchepoix
glitchepoix.description: Combination of vegetables known as the holy quadrinity of the Glitchean cuisine.

glitchmas_card.name: Glitchmas Card
glitchmas_card.description: A holiday greeting card, containing a heart-warming poem.

glitchmas_cracker.name: Glitchmas Cracker
glitchmas_cracker.description: Ostensibly a seasonal cardboard tube wrapped in colored paper. But so much more than that too. Once opened, it looks like it may contain a surprise, a gift, and curious lack of party hat. You probably need somebody else to help you pull it open to find out, though.

glitchmas_cracker_factoid.name: Glitchmas Cracker Fun Fact
glitchmas_cracker_factoid.description: A piece of fun and useful trivia. This would be a good conversation starter at holiday parties. Or not.

glitchmas_cracker_joke.name: Glitchmas Cracker Joke
glitchmas_cracker_joke.description: A joke of dubious quality found in a Glitchmas Cracker. Who writes these things, anyway?

golgi_apparatus.name: Glitchian Remnant Symbol for Baqalic Caesura quest

grade_a_earth_block.name: Grade A Earth Block
grade_a_earth_block.description: Made from earth and spice, and everything … uh … earth & spice, that's it.

grade_aa_earth_block.name: Urth Block
grade_aa_earth_block.description: Marginally muddy earth of Ur, less-than-lofty loam and heavy gas from somewhat suspect origin comprise these useful building blocks.

grade_aaa_earth_block.name: Grade AAA Earth Block
grade_aaa_earth_block.description: Made from the finest ingredients Currants can buy. Grade AAA Earth Blocks are rich in color, high in fibre, and have excellent marbling.

grain_bushel.name: Bushel of Grain
grain_bushel.description: 250 stalks of grain all tied up nice and neat.

grand_ol_grinder.name: Grand Ol' Grinder
grand_ol_grinder.description: More hefty than any grinder you may have met before, a meatier mortar and more powerful pestle means a lot more grind for your currant. Which is good, as it also costs a bunch more currants.

greasy_frybread.name: Greasy Frybread
greasy_frybread.description: A fresh chunk of butter-running-down-your-arms greasy frybread.

green.name: Green
green.description: So fundamental, so intrinsic to the basic laws of culinary science and a healthy spleen that there was only ever one word needed to describe it: Green. So, so green.

green_eggs.name: Green Egg
green_eggs.description: One order of fried green eggs, hold the ham.

greeter_stone.name: Greeter Stone
greeter_stone.description: Summon a real life human greeter if you feel like it.

greeter_twig.name: Greeter Twig
greeter_twig.description: This twig vibrates in the frequency of Greeters, the helpful humans inhabiting the world of Glitch.

grendalinunin.name: Grendalinunin
grendalinunin.description: A compound made out of red, green, blue and shiny.

groddlene.name: Groddlene
groddlene.description: A compound made out of red and green.

guano.name: Guano
guano.description: An unobtrusive pellet from the back end of a Batterfly, Guano can be used as a fertilizer to boost the growth of Crops and Herbs, as an ingredient for Potions, or in the street-building trade.

hairball_flower.name: Hairball Flower
hairball_flower.description: A hairy perennial. Even the thought of eating it causes feelings of antsy twitchiness.

hash.name: Hash
hash.description: A serving of oddly satisfying hash.

hatchet.name: Hatchet
hatchet.description: A slightly dull hatchet, useful for both dead tree-clearing and showy beard-shaving.

hearty_groddle_sammich.name: Hearty Groddle Sammich
hearty_groddle_sammich.description: A meaty Groddle sammich with extra hot 'n' fizzy sauce for extra hot 'n' fizzy energy.

heavy_gas.name: Heavy Gas
heavy_gas.description: A hefty flask of heavy gas. Remember to lift with your legs.

helium.name: Helium
helium.description: One vial of premium colorless, odorless, tasteless helium. You know, the stuff that makes you sound funny.

hell_bartender.name: Hell's Bartender
hell_bartender.description: A mixologist of the underworld, no one knows the true story of Hell's Bartender, but assume he was either really good at pouring bad drinks, or really bad at pouring good drinks in a previous life.

herb_seed_gandlevery.name: Gandlevery Seed
herb_seed_gandlevery.description: A Gandlevery Seed, for growing a pretty bunch of Gandlevery in your Herb Garden.

herb_seed_hairball_flower.name: Hairball Flower Seed
herb_seed_hairball_flower.description: A Hairball Flower Seed, for growing a pretty bunch of Hairball Flowers in your Herb Garden.

herb_seed_purple_flower.name: Purple Flower Seed
herb_seed_purple_flower.description: A Purple Flower Seed, for growing a pretty bunch of Purple Flowers in your Herb Garden.

herb_seed_rookswort.name: Rookswort Seed
herb_seed_rookswort.description: A Rookswort Seed, for growing a pretty bunch of Rooksworts in your Herb Garden.

herb_seed_rubeweed.name: Rubeweed Seed
herb_seed_rubeweed.description: A Rubeweed Seed, for growing a pretty bunch of Rubeweeds in your Herb Garden.

herb_seed_silvertongue.name: Silvertongue Seed
herb_seed_silvertongue.description: A Silvertongue Seed, for growing a pretty bunch of Silvertongues in your Herb Garden.

herb_seed_yellow_crumb_flower.name: Yellow Crumb Flower Seed
herb_seed_yellow_crumb_flower.description: A Yellow Crumb Flower Seed, for growing a pretty bunch of Yellow Crumb Flowers in your Herb Garden.

heston_mash.name: Heston Mash
heston_mash.description: This is not just mashed potato, this is the fanciest, zaniest, most delicious mashed potato Ur has ever ingested. And yet, really, it's still just mashed potato.

high_class_hoe.name: High-Class Hoe
high_class_hoe.description: More refined than your average hoe, the High-Class Hoe is a hoe you'll be proud to be seen with. Extra investment brings a five-times longer lifespan: With this glamorous new companion you'll be hoeing the whole night through.

hoe.name: Hoe
hoe.description: A garden-variety hoe. It can be used to tend weedy patches.

hogtied_piggy.name: Hog-tied Piggy
hogtied_piggy.description: One wiggly wild piggy, bound and gagged. Better pen him up fast. Drop this piggy in your home before he gets away.

homestreet_ticket.name: Home Street Ticket
homestreet_ticket.description: This handy ticket lets you choose your home street style.

honey.name: Honey
honey.description: A brimful jar of raw golden honey.

hooch.name: Hooch
hooch.description: One jug of premium high-octane hooch.

hot_n_fizzy_sauce.name: Hot 'n' Fizzy Sauce
hot_n_fizzy_sauce.description: One jar of potent hot 'n' fizzy sauce. This combustible comestible is packed with energy and all kinds of flaming goodness.

hot_pepper.name: Hot Pepper
hot_pepper.description: A scoop of potentially combustible hot pepper.

hot_potatoes.name: Hot Potatoes
hot_potatoes.description: If a glitch gives you this 'tato, drop it like it's hot. Because it is.

humbabol.name: Humbabol
humbabol.description: A compound made out of blue and shiny.

hungry_nachos.name: Hungry Nachos
hungry_nachos.description: Are you hungry for nachos or are nachos hungry for you? It's nacho decision to make.

ice.name: Ice
ice.description: A nugget of purest ice, plucked with a scraper from the Nubbins of the north and ripe in readiness for sno cones, cocktail making, and icing the occasional strained glitch-groin. Basically: frozen water in pleasingly cuboid form.

ice_knob.name: Ice Nubbin
ice_knob.description: A dribble of purest water, frozen in time, space, and temperature (mainly temperature, actually: it's very cold) into a nubbin of purest ice. Attacking the nubbin with a sharp enough scraper (NB: not as painful as it sounds) will result in handfuls of fresh cuboid ice lumps.

icon_alph.name: Icon of Alph
icon_alph.description: Containing the combined power of eleven already powerful emblems, this Icon of Alph can confer many blessings upon those who show it appropriate adoration.

icon_cosma.name: Icon of Cosma
icon_cosma.description: Emitting a soft glow and a ethereal whistle only butterflies can hear, this Icon of Cosma, made of eleven glistening emblems, can grant many benedictions to those who treat it correctly.

icon_friendly.name: Icon of Friendly
icon_friendly.description: More radiant than can be imagined by a mere mortal Glitch, this powerful Icon of Friendly, made up of eleven separately radiant Emblems of Friendly, confers glorious gifts upon those who use it correctly.

icon_grendaline.name: Icon of Grendaline
icon_grendaline.description: Shimmering like a bottomless pool, this supremely lustrous Icon of Grendaline, made up of eleven individual Emblems, floods with blessings the glitch who shows it proper respect.

icon_humbaba.name: Icon of Humbaba
icon_humbaba.description: As magnificent a sight as any glitch could imagine, this Icon of Humbaba (made from eleven of her dazzling Emblems) bestows blessings generously on those who show it appropriate respect.

icon_lem.name: Icon of Lem
icon_lem.description: Though looking too long at the Icon of Lem is rumoured to cause brain-melting, supplicants who adore it with due caution can expect many glorious benedictions of Lem. Or 'Blemedictions'.

icon_mab.name: Icon of Mab
icon_mab.description: Composed of eleven moderately burnished Emblems of Mab, this majorly buffed Icon of Mab bestows gifts and benedictions upon those who give Mab her due.

icon_pot.name: Icon of Pot
icon_pot.description: Quietly vibrating with a powerful inner light, this Icon of Pot - composed of eleven carefully won Emblems of the same - can deliver great things to those who treat it correctly.

icon_spriggan.name: Icon of Spriggan
icon_spriggan.description: Buzzing with a sense of its own supreme magnificence, this Icon of Spriggan, containing the combined power of eleven emblems, is known to repay generously those who show it adoration correctly.

icon_tii.name: Icon of Tii
icon_tii.description: The ultimate decorative item for the true follower of Tii, this Icon of Tii, made up of eleven Emblems, contains powers far beyond simply looking pretty. Great blessings can belong to the appropriately observant.

icon_zille.name: Icon of Zille
icon_zille.description: Curiously heavy for something that emits so much inner light, this Icon of Zille, made up of eleven Emblems of Zille, can bestow mighty things upon supplicants who know how to use it.

invoking_beryl_rock.name: Aquamarine Matrix
invoking_beryl_rock.description: Once used as both jewelry and currency by ancient Grendalinians, who prized its blue-green watery hue, this product of Crystal Casting is now more frequently used in the invocation and growth of new Beryl Rocks. Or as doorstops.

invoking_dirt_pile.name: Dirty Potion
invoking_dirt_pile.description: The magical element required in the creation of self-regenerating dirt piles. DIRECTIONS FOR USE: For invoking, not quaffing. Quaffing may cause internal dirt piles. Also: migraines.

invoking_dullite_rock.name: Dull Matrix
invoking_dullite_rock.description: Handcrafted by Crystal Casting, this crystal has many facets, but strangely no ability to refract or even absorb light: it just sort of sits there in a dull, lustreless, heavy way. Much thusly prized for use in jewelry by ancient Zillots, it is now more frequently used for growing Dullite rocks from scratch.

invoking_garden.name: Blessed Cornucopia of Crops
invoking_garden.description: Precisely like a regular Cornucopia of Crops… except sparklier, more blessed, and with the ability to invoke into being a whole new small but perfectly formed Crop Garden when placed in the right location. So quite a lot better than a regular Cornucopia of Crops, then.

invoking_herb_garden.name: Blessed Cornucopia of Herbs
invoking_herb_garden.description: A sparkling, magical cornet of Herbs, collected into a Cornucopia, blessed, and smiled upon by Mab. Placed in the right location, this Blessed Cornucopia of Herbs will transform into a simple (but expandable) Herb Garden.

invoking_metal_rock.name: Metal Matrix
invoking_metal_rock.description: Used as the precious stone in ancient ceremonial Alphibian jewelry for many generations (until someone suggested that's why all the high priests had terrible posture), this, the heaviest of the Crystal Cast jewels, is more popularly used for invoking new Metal Rocks from scratch.

invoking_mine.name: Excavation Permit
invoking_mine.description: Certified, signed in triplicate and optimized for use in fax machines, this is a boring permit. It permits the holder (or holder's agent) to partake (or licence participation) in boring activities such as drilling, excavation and all the other hole-exploitation required in the creation of a new 'Mineshaft'.

invoking_patch.name: Essence of Hole Potion
invoking_patch.description: An enchanted liquid hole in a bottle. Single application with the ability to invoke into being a life-supporting patch where once there was nothing. Or "where once there was some other ground that you weirdly couldn't plant a tree in". DO NOT QUAFF.

invoking_shrine.name: Shrine Marker
invoking_shrine.description: For those who desire their own direct connection to the Giants, this is magical base from which a Shrine can be invoked. A combination of one Holy Pole, an Icon and a specific Giantly item, it's like the a socket for a hotline to glory. Or a hotline to giantly favor, anyway.

invoking_sparkly_rock.name: Bright Matrix
invoking_sparkly_rock.description: Highly prized, and shining with the internal fizz of a thousand stars, this Crystal Cast matrix can be used to grow a new Sparkly Rock from scratch. That is, if you can stop random strangers from stealing it and crouching in caves, clutching it to their bosoms and referring to it as their "precious". Weirdos.

irrigator_9000.name: Irrigator 9000
irrigator_9000.description: Galvanised for your pleasure, the Irrigator 9000 offers unparalleled waterability for the constant gardener. With reinforced spout for a five-times longer life - you get what you pay for.

ixite.name: Ixite
ixite.description: A compound made out of red, green, blue and shiny.

ixstyle_braised_meat.name: Ix-Style Braised Meat
ixstyle_braised_meat.description: A side of rich, meaty meat, braised a la Ix.

jellisac.name: Jellisac Growth
jellisac.description: It's not something you particularly want to stick your hand into, but the Jellisac Clumps that result from a successful "sac-delving" are worth it. Even if they do make reaching in your bag an unpleasant experience.

jellisac_clump.name: Clump of Jellisac
jellisac_clump.description: It's like your mother always said, just because it's slimy, doesn't mean it's not desirable. Even if she didn't say it, this stuff is certainly gloopy, and eminently usable. Where ooze is needed, jellisacs are your friend.

js_test_item.name: JS Test Item
js_test_item.description: A generic test item used for testing item code not associated with any existing item

juicy_carpaccio.name: Juicy Carpaccio
juicy_carpaccio.description: A tempting platter of juicy carpaccio with all the trimmings.

juju_paperweight.name: Ancestral Paperweight
juju_paperweight.description: An ancient decorative weight of uncanny beauty and density, this relic is used by the Juju Bandits to secure the bounty of their traditional paper hunts.

juju_shoo_shoo_powder.name: Juju Shoo-Shoo Powder
juju_shoo_shoo_powder.description: An extremely effective talc useful in the shooing away of Jujus.

juju_trowel.name: Juju Trowel
juju_trowel.description: A rustic trowel fashioned by Juju Bandits for delicate digging in the dense savanna dirt.

junked_tool_part.name: Junked Tool Part
junked_tool_part.description: A piece of old thing so twisted and gnarly, its impossible what kind of tool this it used to be. It's pretty easy to tell what it is now, however: it's junk.

kings_of_condiments.name: King of Condiments
kings_of_condiments.description: Otherwise known as the blandest rub in all of Ur. Meh.

knife_and_board.name: Knife & Board
knife_and_board.description: A good knife and cutting board. They can be used to make simple foods.

krazy_salts.name: Krazy Salts
krazy_salts.description: A vital magical ingredient, Krazy Salts should never be mistaken for normal, run of the spice-mill Pinch of Salt. For one thing, you need to save it for Potions. For the other, this Salt be KRAZY! Seriously: keep it away from sharp objects.

laughing_gas.name: Laughing Gas
laughing_gas.description: One carefully corked container of gigglicious laughing gas.

lazy_salad.name: Lazy Salad
lazy_salad.description: Sliced tomatoes and cheese. It doesn't get much lazier than a lazy salad.

legumes_parisienne.name: Legumes Abbassidienne
legumes_parisienne.description: The most sophisticated, chic ways to prepare a bean: simply, classically, with a smile, a touch of flair, and a really big guillotine.

lemburger.name: Lemburger
lemburger.description: A single-decker Lemburger with all the fixins.

lemene.name: Lemene
lemene.description: A compound made out of red, green, blue and shiny.

lemon.name: Lemon
lemon.description: One half of a nice pair of lemons.

lemon_juice.name: Lemon Juice
lemon_juice.description: A tall glass of exquisitely sour lemon juice.

letter_block.name: Letter Block
letter_block.description: A block with many letters on. But only one at a time. A block of many letters. A letter block.

light_beam.name: Light Beam
light_beam.description: Select a light to travel to new places.

limited_edition_imitation_grichmas_yeti.name: Highest Quality #1 "Imported" Glitchmas Yeti
limited_edition_imitation_grichmas_yeti.description: A genuine, imitation Glitchmas Yeti. It is qualities without peer and it is always ensuring you are satisfy.

lips.name: Lips
lips.description: Pre-pursed, super-soft and infused with an antibacterial salve, these lips can be attached to whatever might help you kiss people better. Like, say, an Emotional Bear.

loam.name: Lump of Loam
loam.description: Ah, loam sweet loam. Moist and fertile, and leagues above plain old earth, this rich, meaty chunk of ground will do any building project proud.

loomer.name: Loomer
loomer.description: The Loomer (TM) is used to Loom thread into String, General Fabric and Rugs through a process of Loomeration so complex, only those with a deep enough understanding of the Fiber Arts II can perform the Loomering.

luxury_tortellini.name: Luxury Tortellini
luxury_tortellini.description: It's tortellini, stuffed with extravagance and drizzled with grandeur.

mabbish_coffee.name: Mabbish Coffee
mabbish_coffee.description: A Mabbish coffee has all the goodness of regular coffee, but gooder.

mabon.name: Mabon
mabon.description: A compound made out of green, blue and shiny.

maburger_royale.name: Maburger Royale
maburger_royale.description: It's not just seasoned beans in a bun smothered in stinky cheese - it's so much more than that. Oh no wait. It's just that.

machine_stand.name: Machine Stand
machine_stand.description: This generic machine stand provides just the right foundation upon which many a machine can be built. As with all good foundations, once assembled it cannot be moved.

magic_butterfly_stick.name: Butterfly Stick
magic_butterfly_stick.description: One stick imbued with purest butterfly attractant. Placed in a house or on your land, any Butterflies close enough that their wings tingle with the frequency of buttervibes the stick resonates at (a very precise range) will be irresistibly attracted to it.

magic_chicken_stick.name: Chicken Stick
magic_chicken_stick.description: A stick for summoning and containing poultry in a happy feathery cabal. When placed in a house or on your land, chickens within walking, flapping or climbing range will feel an irresistible physical draw to this chick magnet.

magic_pig_stick.name: Pig Stick
magic_pig_stick.description: The saying "Speak softly and carry a Pig Stick" is wise but misleading, as the Pig Stick is not effective when carried, only once placed somewhere in your home or on your land. There, Piggies within trotting distance will feel irresistibly drawn to the precious Pig Stick, and want to stay near it.

meat_collector.name: Meat Collector
meat_collector.description: A farm-grade meat collector. It works around the clock to collect meat from your piggies when you can't.

meat_gumbo.name: Meat Gumbo
meat_gumbo.description: A bowl of thick, meaty gumbo.

mega_healthy_veggie_juice.name: Mega Healthy Veggie Juice
mega_healthy_veggie_juice.description: A bracing tumbler of mega-healthy veggie juice.

metal_post.name: Metal Bar
metal_post.description: A post made of metal. Good for arduous construction, securing Mineshafts, and doing daring dances on while people tuck herbs into your elasticated pants (probably not all at the same time).

metal_rock.name: Chunk of Metal Rock
metal_rock.description: Chunky and metally, this rock, when smelted, makes Plain Metal. Boring maybe, but it's an excellent base for more ambitious alchemical experimentation.

metal_rod.name: Metal Rod
metal_rod.description: Metal Rod, made of tin and plain metal, is not only useful for the yet unimagined construction purposes, but is also a much beloved snack of a Sloth.

metalmaker.name: Metal Machine
metalmaker.description: A bangy, squeaky, marvellous red-hot metal machine. For the mutation of Plain Metal, Tin, Copper and Molybdenum into Metal Rods, Bars and Girders. None more metal.

metalmaker_mechanism.name: Metal Machine Mechanism
metalmaker_mechanism.description: The type of smooth, perfectly-honed mechanism you would expect from followers of Alph. Whatever function it is that this performs in the Metalmaker, it does it very, very well.

metalmaker_tooler.name: Metal Machine Tooler
metalmaker_tooler.description: Silvery, heavy, and glistening with hot oil, lump of machinery so beautiful, complex and well crafted that it must have been tooled in some kind of academy.

mexicali_eggs.name: Mexicali Eggs
mexicali_eggs.description: A heaping serving of bean-infused eggs.

mike_tyson_grill.name: Famous Pugilist Grill
mike_tyson_grill.description: For grilling food. Named after the infamous gang of Potian Grillers (all called George) who roamed the countryside in days of yore, indiscriminately punching things into submission then grilling them until they were well done. Whole continents once lived in fear of the Four Georgemen of the Apocgrillypse. You, meanwhile, get to use their tribute novelty cooking item.

mild_sauce.name: Mild Sauce
mild_sauce.description: Bland ho! It's some inoffensive mild sauce.

milk.name: Milk
milk.description: Milked from a butterfly. Surprisingly creamy.

milk_butterfly.name: Butterfly Milk
milk_butterfly.description: A vial of butterfly milk. It has the tingly effervescence of a thousand tiny butterfly farts.

million_craant_trophy.name: Million Currant Trophy
million_craant_trophy.description: Want to show that you had a million currants? Display this.

million_currant_trophy.name: Million Currant Trophy
million_currant_trophy.description: Why earn, if not to display? Imagine the awe and jealousy this trophy will inspire! Sweet, sweet jealousy...

molybdenum.name: Molybdenum Ingot
molybdenum.description: The glint off a good piece of Molybdenum is like glimpsing into the future. That's why it's used for sophisticated and desirable electronic gadgetry.

moon.name: Moon
moon.description: One full, craterous moon, without which mooning cannot happen. Most useful if attached to an Emotional Bear.

mortar_barnacle.name: Mortar Barnacle
mortar_barnacle.description: An unpretentious lump commonly found growing in marshland. Slow-growing, but once a barnacle reaches full blister, they can be scraped off with the right tool, and ground down.

mountain_lantern.name: Lantern
mountain_lantern.description: A handy lantern for driving back the freeze on the mountain.

mountain_permit.name: Permit for Mountaineering
mountain_permit.description: Gives you and your party access to one mountain area.

mountaineering_permit.name: Mountaineering Permit
mountaineering_permit.description: A permit allowing one party of adventurers access to the highest heights of Ur. See how high you can go!

musicblock_b_brown_01.name: Musicblock BB-1
musicblock_b_brown_01.description: The hit single off the best selling album "Music For Batterflies", inspired by the enchanting noises inside a batterfly's gastrointestinal tract.

musicblock_b_brown_02.name: Musicblock BB-2
musicblock_b_brown_02.description: Warning: excessive volume may cause eyeball jelly to vibrate (in a good way).

musicblock_b_brown_03.name: Musicblock BB-3
musicblock_b_brown_03.description: Lie back, close your eyes, and let the music wash over you, like the a cool sea breeze on a hot Alakol day. Or the tongues of a thousand piggies.

musicblock_b_brown_04.name: Musicblock BB-4
musicblock_b_brown_04.description: Voted Head-bumpingest, Toe-tappingest, Ear-wormingest, Air-drummingest Music Block of the Year, every year, for three centuries running.

musicblock_b_brown_05.name: Musicblock BB-5
musicblock_b_brown_05.description: Like the noise of Tii's sleeping brain, creating whole new rhythmical logarithms of imagination, but in musical form.

musicblock_d_blue_01.name: Musicblock DB-1
musicblock_d_blue_01.description: Knees, prepare to be slapped. This musicblock takes no prisoners with its twangy goodness.

musicblock_d_blue_02.name: Musicblock DB-2
musicblock_d_blue_02.description: Like the songs that giants hum to themselves when they're feeling blue. Unless they ARE blue, in which case they don't sing this way at all.

musicblock_d_blue_03.name: Musicblock DB-3
musicblock_d_blue_03.description: Warning: May cause you to do the chicken boogie.

musicblock_d_blue_04.name: Musicblock DB-4
musicblock_d_blue_04.description: Feet everywhere will tap despite themselves when they hear this.

musicblock_d_blue_05.name: Musicblock DB-5
musicblock_d_blue_05.description: If you could amplify butterfly song, this is roughly what it would sound like.

musicblock_d_green_01.name: Musicblock DG-1
musicblock_d_green_01.description: Hoe Magazine gave this musicblock 6.8 out of a possible 7 pointlets.

musicblock_d_green_03.name: Musicblock DG-3
musicblock_d_green_03.description: Some would ban this musicblock. Might not be a bad idea.

musicblock_d_green_04.name: Musicblock DG-4
musicblock_d_green_04.description: This one is like that song from that guy who did that other musicblock.

musicblock_d_green_05.name: Musicblock DG-5
musicblock_d_green_05.description: Rock out with your block out. This is the musicblock anthem that's taking Groddle Forest by storm.

musicblock_d_red_01.name: Musicblock DR-1
musicblock_d_red_01.description: Music to drink a Cloud 11 Smoothie by.

musicblock_d_red_02.name: Musicblock DR-2
musicblock_d_red_02.description: The bestselling theme song from 'A Pig Petter's Diary'.

musicblock_d_red_03.name: Musicblock DR-3
musicblock_d_red_03.description: Underpants have been known to become airborne at the sound of this musicblock. Watch your back.

musicblock_d_red_04.name: Musicblock DR-4
musicblock_d_red_04.description: The best ear-wormy racket-pop currants can buy.

musicblock_d_red_05.name: Musicblock DR-5
musicblock_d_red_05.description: This friendly little tune reaches into your brain and scratches your hypothalamus. Tickly.

musicblock_goodnight_groddle.name: Musicblock GNG
musicblock_goodnight_groddle.description: Once upon a time, this was the song that sent the world into slumber.

musicblock_sb_secret_01.name: Musicblock SB-1
musicblock_sb_secret_01.description: This is the rare original recording of the song the Giants were humming when they were imagining the world.

musicblock_x_shiny_01.name: Musicblock XS-1
musicblock_x_shiny_01.description: This is sort of an experimental, free-form, jazzy, fusiony something-or-other. Heavy on the experimental.

musicblock_x_shiny_02.name: Musicblock XS-2
musicblock_x_shiny_02.description: It's a little-known fact that this snappy little ditty was the inspiration for the phrase 'snappy little ditty'.

musicblock_x_shiny_03.name: Musicblock XS-3
musicblock_x_shiny_03.description: This rare musicblock is a bootleg from a Lapulapu Cavern rave dance party.

musicblock_x_shiny_04.name: Musicblock XS-4
musicblock_x_shiny_04.description: Rare recording of classic Glitch-hop before it all went mainstream.

musicblock_x_shiny_05.name: Musicblock XS-5
musicblock_x_shiny_05.description: If you played a butterfly song backward, this is roughly what it would sound like. You can barely hear the demons.

naraka_flame_rub.name: Naraka Flame Rub
naraka_flame_rub.description: A slightly spicy minute on the lips, a horrifically painful burning in the general area of the hips, some people say. But what do they know? Wussies.

no_no_powder.name: No-No Powder
no_no_powder.description: Some tempting no-no powder. You know you shouldn't, but maybe just this once …

note.name: Note
note.description: A note is the kind of thing you write on.

note_hint.name: Secret Juju Hint
note_hint.description: If you can decipher this clue, it might lead you somewhere interesting.

note_manor_mystery.name: Strange Note
note_manor_mystery.description: A strange note found in Hauki Seeks Manor.

note_pole.name: Note Pole
note_pole.description: I'm a little note pole which you can customize to your heart's desire and then place in your yard or your house. Post a note on me to amuse, astonish or edify your visitors.

npc_batterfly.name: Batterfly
npc_batterfly.description: Found in caverns (where the perpetual darkness may account for their pissy mood) it has been shown that Batterflies, when fed at one end, produce useful agricultural materials from the other.

npc_blimp.name: Blimp
npc_blimp.description: Or is it zeppelin? I always forget. Anyway, it goes over like a led balloon.

npc_bureaucrat.name: Bureaucrat
npc_bureaucrat.description: While this bureaucrat can't be described as faceless, given the presence of a face, the fact that you can't tell any of them apart renders its face basically unnecessary. Charged with the granting (or not) of permits, this is a world of red tape and frustration in an ill-fitting suit, basically.

npc_butterfly.name: Butterfly
npc_butterfly.description: A morphously blue butterfly. As any fool knows, butter can't fly, but milk apparently can. Butterflies may need a little kindness (or massage) before they give up the milk, but milk can always be turned into butter… and cheese… and who knows what else?

npc_cactus.name: Cactus
npc_cactus.description: Hidden away in a scorching place, the Cactus has seen things he can never unsee. You can try to help, but help is limited. Do not, whatever you do, consider hugging the cactus.

npc_chicken.name: Chicken
npc_chicken.description: An easily agitated member of the poultry classes. Given to flights of fearful fantasy, high-pitched paranoia and, frankly, short distances, chickens are a reliable source of grain (it's said that they keep it in the hot pockets under their wings).

npc_cooking_vendor.name: Meal Vendor
npc_cooking_vendor.description: A friend indeed to a miner in need, Monsieur de Nomdenoms is a purveyor of high-end food for those in the deeps who need energy fast - and are willing to pay handsomely for it.

npc_crab.name: Crab
npc_crab.description: Anyone knows music makes crabs happy, but it takes an expert DJ to satiate both the appetite for variety and yen for classic tunes it desires. The tunesmith who can play a full array of Music Blocks, culminating with a cherished favorite, will be richly rewarded.

npc_crafty_bot.name: Crafty Bot
npc_crafty_bot.description: A robot that can make stuff for you.

npc_cubimal_batterfly.description: It's a Batterfly Cubimal! Collect all Series 1 Cubimals!

npc_cubimal_squid.description: It's a Squid Cubimal! Collect all Series 1 Cubimals!

npc_cubimal_trisor.description: It's a Trisor Cubimal! Collect all Series 2 Cubimals!

npc_cubimal_unclefriendly.description: It's an Uncle Friendly Cubimal! Collect all Series 1 Cubimals!

npc_cubimal_uraliastreetspirit.name: Uralia Street Spirit Cubimal
npc_cubimal_uraliastreetspirit.description: It's a Uralia Street Spirit Cubimal! Collect all Series 2 Cubimals!

npc_cubimal_yeti.name: Yeti Cubimal
npc_cubimal_yeti.description: It's a Yeti Cubimal! Collect all Series 1 Cubimals!

npc_deimaginator.name: Deimaginator
npc_deimaginator.description: Enemies of imagination, these shadowy figures are locked in an eternal struggle to stop the trafficking of mysterious contraband. Beware of their grabby little hands!

npc_dustbunny.name: Dust Bunny
npc_dustbunny.description: An ikkle fwuffy cutesy wutesy Dust Bunny. As cute as a small fluffy ball made of dead skin and discarded hair can be, at any rate. Still, at least it's polite.

npc_firefly.name: Firefly
npc_firefly.description: The perfect alliance of science and nature, the dowdy brown coat of the firefly when landed belies their beauty when in flight: a heart of gold, a tiny buzzy fizzling flying flame. Thought to have washed up on the banks of the mythological River Tam and taken flight eleventy billion eras ago, and never rested or run out of gas since. The firefly's glowing essence can be used to create crystals.

npc_fox.name: Fox
npc_fox.description: The sly, cunning, quick brown fox has a tail full of fibers perfect for spinning. Shifting position quickly, you can rely on a fox to be fast-paced, slippery and hard to pin down, they care deeply about some things (getting as much bait as they can, giving up as few tail hairs as possible to society) but interact very little with the real world.

npc_fox_ranger.name: Fox Ranger
npc_fox_ranger.description: Guardian of the Fox Reserves, it is up to each individual Fox Ranger to ensure that only proper Fox Bait is used to lure foxes, and not, say, cheese, which makes them cough. They are also in charge of making sure people use the right brush, and don't steal the foxes.

npc_garden_gnome.name: Garden Gnome
npc_garden_gnome.description: Hey, it's that weird old tiny bearded life-companion you've been hoping for! When placed in your yard, house or on your home street, your new little chum will reveal his hidden (or "creepy") talents…

npc_gardening_vendor.name: Gardening Tools Vendor
npc_gardening_vendor.description: A mysterious leftover from another age, the scarecrow has always been a dependable source of gardening tools, keeping, as he does, an infinite number of hoes in his surprisingly capacious bag.

npc_gwendolyn.name: Ghost of Gwendolyn
npc_gwendolyn.description: The ethereal manifestation of one of the ancients that used to inhabit Ur, long before the Glitches arrived. She claims to be a disciple of Cosma, who died when the age of Grendaline overtook the world with a great flood. But who can tell? Ghosts are notoriously inconsistent.

npc_jabba1.name: Uncle Friendly
npc_jabba1.description: An old-school corner store with a small stock of groceries and fresh (-ish) produce. It's a handy little place to shop, if you don't mind that Uncle Friendly isn't friendly (especially if you ask him about his centuries-old tempestuous relationship with Helga), or that everything you buy to eat there looks like the best-before date has been amended with a crayon.

npc_jabba2.name: Helga
npc_jabba2.description: Reticent about discussing her past, it is thought that Helga may remember the Age of Friendly (if there was ever such a time), given that she is, and always has been, the source of many fine beverages.

npc_juju_bandit.name: Juju Bandit
npc_juju_bandit.description: The scourge of the Baqala, the Juju Bandits roam the ancestral lands with an insatiable hunger for other people's stuff. Particularly fond of paper, a Juju bandit can be outfoxed, outrun, or outsmarted with teleportation.

npc_juju_grandma.name: Juju Grandma
npc_juju_grandma.description: The meanest and most mercenary of the Juju band, Juju Grandma has no compunction about robbing you blind and leaving you for rookfood. (Unless you can be of help. Then you might get to live. Maybe)

npc_kitty_chicken.name: Heli Kitty
npc_kitty_chicken.description: This kitty never needs to worry about landing on its feet.

npc_letterblock.name: Letter Block
npc_letterblock.description: A block with a letter on it.

npc_mailbox.name: Mailbox
npc_mailbox.description: Mailbox Zero is nirvana for some, this is one better than that: Mailbox (1) is one mailbox, made to house your very own mail. Epistles, deliveries, snapshots or gifts, whatever you've been sent from another can be found lurking in your mailbox. If you're too busy to access your mailbox, your Butler can do it for you. After all, what else are butlers for?

npc_maintenance_bot.name: MaintenanceBot M-64
npc_maintenance_bot.description: Once at the bleeding edge of technology, MaintenanceBot M-64 was mainly removed from domestic service after someone pointed out that technology shouldn't make you bleed. Now relegated to the subway, where no one cares if you're a malfunctioning weirdly-rattling pointy-edged potentially-explosive robot. Luckily.

npc_myopic_frog.name: Myopic Delivery Frog
npc_myopic_frog.description: A wannabe AFLC delivery frog, suffering from a shortness of vision (while possessing the requisite amount of inner clarity).

npc_newxp_dustbunny.name: Dustbunny
npc_newxp_dustbunny.description: An ikkle fwuffy cutesy wutesy Dustbunny. As cute as a small fluffy ball made of dead skin and discarded hair can be, at any rate. Still, at least it's polite.

npc_piggy.name: Piggy
npc_piggy.description: One happy little porcine with a laidback attitude to life and a lot of love to give. Whether wild or domestic, the piggy gives wisdom from one end, useful gardening supplies from the other, and delicious meat from everywhere inbetween.

npc_piggy_explorer.name: Ilmenskie Jones
npc_piggy_explorer.description: Professor of porkthropology, obtainer of rare artifacts and the most famous porcine adventurer in all of Ur, Ilmenskie Jones is perhaps the most dreamy pig ever to wear a hat. He only suffers two flaws: fear of noodles (apparently he doesn't like the way they slither), and a tendency to get trapped in caves.

npc_quest_giver_widget.name: Greeterbot Sentry G-42
npc_quest_giver_widget.description: The patented Greeterbot Sentry G-42 does mainly what it said on the oversized Greeterbot Sentry G-42 box - greets, stands sentry (to the fragile world of the Ghost of Gwendolyn) and charges admission for things he will never get to experience for himself. A sad, but worthwhile, life.

npc_quest_hidden.name: Hidden NPC
npc_quest_hidden.description: This is a secret, hidden NPC to use for doing secret stuff.

npc_rare_item_vendor.name: Extremely Rare Items Vendor
npc_rare_item_vendor.description: This vendor... shhhh!... sells items that are extremely rare!

npc_rube.name: Rube
npc_rube.description: Rube is always keen to make a deal. So keen, in fact, that he'll often end up making the wrong one - but as long as a deal is done, Rube is happy. Deal or no deal, he'll return for another try just when you're least expecting him (or, with the right potion, precisely when you ARE expecting him).

npc_salmon.name: Salmon
npc_salmon.description: One fresh, wild, slinky, slippery salmon. Some say there is a soul of a glitch contained within each salmon. In which case, souls taste delicious when stuffed in your pocket then grilled up on a nice rustic plank.

npc_shrine_alph.name: Shrine to Alph
npc_shrine_alph.description: This is a shrine to Alph, the giant of creation. If you've ever wondered "Why do Piggies make meat?" or "Which came first: the chicken or the egg plant?" chances are Alph has the answer.

npc_shrine_cosma.name: Shrine to Cosma
npc_shrine_cosma.description: This is a shrine to Cosma. As the giant who governs the sky, Cosma is also the giant of levity and meditation. She is, also, the only giant capable of herding butterflies.

npc_shrine_firebog_alph.name: Shrine to Alph
npc_shrine_firebog_alph.description: This is a shrine to Alph, the giant of creation. If you've ever wondered "Why do Piggies make meat?" or "Which came first: the chicken or the egg plant?" chances are Alph has the answer.

npc_shrine_firebog_cosma.name: Shrine to Cosma
npc_shrine_firebog_cosma.description: This is a shrine to Cosma. As the giant who governs the sky, Cosma is also the giant of levity and meditation. She is, also, the only giant capable of herding butterflies.

npc_shrine_firebog_friendly.name: Shrine to Friendly
npc_shrine_firebog_friendly.description: This is a shrine to Friendly, the giant who oversees all things celestial, nocturnal, lunar, stygian and murky. Despite this, he is, as his name implies, considered by many to be the nicest of the giants and the one most likely to loan you twenty currants till payday.

npc_shrine_firebog_grendaline.name: Shrine to Grendaline
npc_shrine_firebog_grendaline.description: This is a shrine to Grendaline. Quietly loyal and fierce, Grendaline is the giant who governs all things watery, from clouds and fogs to mountain streams and oceans. As a sideline, she is also influential in the sphere of big, fluffy towels.

npc_shrine_firebog_humbaba.name: Shrine to Humbaba
npc_shrine_firebog_humbaba.description: This is a shrine to Humbaba, the giant who rules both two-legged and four-legged beasts. Actually, she rules all the beasts with even-numbered quantities of legs. The odd-numbered ones are on their own.

npc_shrine_firebog_lem.name: Shrine to Lem
npc_shrine_firebog_lem.description: This is a shrine to Lem, the giant of travel and navigation. If you've ever found yourself somewhere you didn't plan to be, chances are it was a Lemish practical joke, for which he is utterly unrepentant.

npc_shrine_firebog_mab.name: Shrine to Mab
npc_shrine_firebog_mab.description: This is a shrine to Mab, the giant who holds sway over the harvest. She honors industriousness, and rightfully so. Sometimes, however, industriousness can turn to greed. This is a problem.

npc_shrine_firebog_pot.name: Shrine to Pot
npc_shrine_firebog_pot.description: This is a shrine to Pot. Big-hearted and generous, Pot is the giant who dispenses prosperity and good fortune. Which is all well and good if you can keep sloth and indolence at bay. Tricky.

npc_shrine_firebog_spriggan.name: Shrine to Spriggan
npc_shrine_firebog_spriggan.description: This is a shrine to Spriggan. Sure, Spriggan is the most taciturn and humorless of all the giants. You would be, too, if you had sole dominion over the trees. Trees are serious business, you know.

npc_shrine_firebog_tii.name: Shrine to Tii
npc_shrine_firebog_tii.description: This is a shrine to Tii, the overseer of elements, and the giant who manipulates all matters alchemical. Unlike the other giants, Tii is neither male nor female. Or both male and female. It's either really simple or really confusing, depending how you look at it. Some reckon this is why Tii seems cold and distant. They are incorrect. Tii is merely calculating and combining. It's distracting.

npc_shrine_firebog_zille.name: Shrine to Zille
npc_shrine_firebog_zille.description: This is a shrine to Zille, the giant whose domain is the mountains. Hills, too. Also hillocks, pingos, drumlins and buttes. It's safe to consider that any bump in the ground is Zille's turf. She takes no responsibility, however, for volcanoes.

npc_shrine_friendly.name: Shrine to Friendly
npc_shrine_friendly.description: This is a shrine to Friendly, the giant who oversees all things celestial, nocturnal, lunar, stygian and murky. Despite this, he is, as his name implies, considered by many to be the nicest of the giants and the one most likely to loan you twenty currants till payday.
