npc_shrine_lem.description: This is a shrine to Lem, the giant of travel and navigation. If you've ever found yourself somewhere you didn't plan to be, chances are it was a Lemish practical joke, for which he is utterly unrepentant.

npc_shrine_mab.name: Shrine to Mab
npc_shrine_mab.description: This is a shrine to Mab, the giant who holds sway over the harvest. She honors industriousness, and rightfully so. Sometimes, however, industriousness can turn to greed. This is a problem.

npc_shrine_pot.name: Shrine to Pot
npc_shrine_pot.description: This is a shrine to Pot. Big-hearted and generous, Pot is the giant who dispenses prosperity and good fortune. Which is all well and good if you can keep sloth and indolence at bay. Tricky.

npc_shrine_spriggan.name: Shrine to Spriggan
npc_shrine_spriggan.description: This is a shrine to Spriggan. Sure, Spriggan is the most taciturn and humorless of all the giants. You would be, too, if you had sole dominion over the trees. Trees are serious business, you know.

npc_shrine_ti.name: Shrine to Tii
npc_shrine_ti.description: This is a shrine to Tii, the overseer of elements, and the giant who manipulates all matters alchemical. Unlike the other giants, Tii is neither male nor female. Or both male and female. It's either really simple or really confusing, depending how you look at it. Some reckon this is why Tii seems cold and distant. They are incorrect. Tii is merely calculating and combining. It's distracting.

npc_shrine_uralia_alph.name: Shrine to Alph
npc_shrine_uralia_alph.description: This is a shrine to Alph, the giant of creation. If you've ever wondered "Why do Piggies make meat?" or "Which came first: the chicken or the egg plant?" chances are Alph has the answer.

npc_shrine_uralia_cosma.name: Shrine to Cosma
npc_shrine_uralia_cosma.description: This is a shrine to Cosma. As the giant who governs the sky, Cosma is also the giant of levity and meditation. She is, also, the only giant capable of herding butterflies.

npc_shrine_uralia_friendly.name: Shrine to Friendly
npc_shrine_uralia_friendly.description: This is a shrine to Friendly, the giant who oversees all things celestial, nocturnal, lunar, stygian and murky. Despite this, he is, as his name implies, considered by many to be the nicest of the giants and the one most likely to loan you twenty currants till payday.

npc_shrine_uralia_grendaline.name: Shrine to Grendaline
npc_shrine_uralia_grendaline.description: This is a shrine to Grendaline. Quietly loyal and fierce, Grendaline is the giant who governs all things watery, from clouds and fogs to mountain streams and oceans. As a sideline, she is also influential in the sphere of big, fluffy towels.

npc_shrine_uralia_humbaba.name: Shrine to Humbaba
npc_shrine_uralia_humbaba.description: This is a shrine to Humbaba, the giant who rules both two-legged and four-legged beasts. Actually, she rules all the beasts with even-numbered quantities of legs. The odd-numbered ones are on their own.

npc_shrine_uralia_lem.name: Shrine to Lem
npc_shrine_uralia_lem.description: This is a shrine to Lem, the giant of travel and navigation. If you've ever found yourself somewhere you didn't plan to be, chances are it was a Lemish practical joke, for which he is utterly unrepentant.

npc_shrine_uralia_mab.name: Shrine to Mab
npc_shrine_uralia_mab.description: This is a shrine to Mab, the giant who holds sway over the harvest. She honors industriousness, and rightfully so. Sometimes, however, industriousness can turn to greed. This is a problem.

npc_shrine_uralia_pot.name: Shrine to Pot
npc_shrine_uralia_pot.description: This is a shrine to Pot. Big-hearted and generous, Pot is the giant who dispenses prosperity and good fortune. Which is all well and good if you can keep sloth and indolence at bay. Tricky.

npc_shrine_uralia_spriggan.name: Shrine to Spriggan
npc_shrine_uralia_spriggan.description: This is a shrine to Spriggan. Sure, Spriggan is the most taciturn and humorless of all the giants. You would be, too, if you had sole dominion over the trees. Trees are serious business, you know.

npc_shrine_uralia_ti.name: Shrine to Tii
npc_shrine_uralia_ti.description: This is a shrine to Tii, the overseer of elements, and the giant who manipulates all matters alchemical. Unlike the other giants, Tii is neither male nor female. Or both male and female. It's either really simple or really confusing, depending how you look at it. Some reckon this is why Tii seems cold and distant. They are incorrect. Tii is merely calculating and combining. It's distracting.

npc_shrine_uralia_zille.name: Shrine to Zille
npc_shrine_uralia_zille.description: This is a shrine to Zille, the giant whose domain is the mountains. Hills, too. Also hillocks, pingos, drumlins and buttes. It's safe to consider that any bump in the ground is Zille's turf. She takes no responsibility, however, for volcanoes.

npc_shrine_zille.name: Shrine to Zille
npc_shrine_zille.description: This is a shrine to Zille, the giant whose domain is the mountains. Hills, too. Also hillocks, pingos, drumlins and buttes. It's safe to consider that any bump in the ground is Zille's turf. She takes no responsibility, however, for volcanoes.

npc_sloth.name: Sloth
npc_sloth.description: Slow-moving, metal-loving, laid-back, rod-eating and snail-spitting the Sloth is not, contrary to popular opinion, lovable and lazy. The sloth is merely conserving energy. What for? The sloth will not say. Fear the sloth.

npc_smuggler.name: Smuggler
npc_smuggler.description: A member of the [REDACTED] movement, whose attempts to overthrow [REDACTED] and bring about [REDACTED] by transferring parcels of [REDACTED] from Point A to Point [REDACTED] are disrupted by deimaginators, who have been monitoring and censoring their [REDACTED] revolutionary literature for many millennia.

npc_sno_cone_vending_machine.name: Sno Cone Vending Machine
npc_sno_cone_vending_machine.description: An automatic, systematic, hydromatic snowcone vending machine, for the exclusive purchase of snowcones. An acquired taste (in that you have to acquire them before you taste them), some of the more expensive snocones are only suitable for a refined palate - you have to be a certain level to eat them.

npc_squid.name: Zzybzfrx
npc_squid.description: A creature as mysterious as it is legless, Zzybzfrx knows what you have seen, and where you have been, and will never tell a soul.

npc_tool_vendor.name: Tool Vendor
npc_tool_vendor.description: Ever find yourself deep down in the Caverns, chipping away at a rich seam when your Fancy Pick breaks and you find yourself with no tinkertool to correct the problem? The Tool Vendor - widely suspected to be a bureaucroc gone rogue - will help you out. If it's the kind of thing you might need to fix, or the kind of thing you might need to fix it, it's probably here.

npc_yoga_frog.name: AFLC Frog
npc_yoga_frog.description: These frogs deliver parcels for both the Auction Fulfillment and Logistics Corporation and the General Inter-Giant Postal Delivery Service to fund their yoga classes, organic produce addictions and respective degrees in alternative healing. As a rule, they experience a high degree of spiritual oneness.

oaty_cake.name: Oaty Cake
oaty_cake.description: A slightly dry, somewhat crumbly oaty cake.

oily_dressing.name: Oily Dressing
oily_dressing.description: A bottle of cheap, yet strangely satisfying, oily dressing.

older_spice.name: Old(er) Spice
older_spice.description: A handful of colorful older spice.

olive_oil.name: Olive Oil
olive_oil.description: A bottle of top-notch olive oil, no virgins required.

onion_rings.name: Onion Ring
onion_rings.description: Battered and fried, these are onions prepared the way Pot intended. Rumored to be popular amongst the elves. Wait, what's an elf?

onion_sauce.name: Onion Sauce
onion_sauce.description: A jar of eye-wateringly zesty onion sauce.

orange_juice.name: Orange Juice
orange_juice.description: A surprising glass of orange juice.

ore_grinder.name: Grinder
ore_grinder.description: A sturdy, no-nonsense grinder. Harness its awesome power to grind rocks (and those rock-like barnacles) into alchemical elements.

pad_tii.name: Pad Tii
pad_tii.description: Tii has not heard of this dish yet. Chances are it would not approve. Do not tell Tii. Please.

paper_tree.name: Paper Tree
paper_tree.description: Turns out that paper DOES grow on trees, as long as the tree in question is this one. The sheety fruit of this practical tree is a prerequisite for all manner of Penpersonship skills.

papl_upside_down_pizza.name: Pineapple Upside-Down Pizza
papl_upside_down_pizza.description: A plate of exotically topsy-turvy pizza.

paradise_ticket_abysmal_thrill.name: Ticket to Abysmal Thrill
paradise_ticket_abysmal_thrill.description: Activate this card to explore the depths of Abysmal Thrill, floating up as you test your quoin-gettin' skills.

paradise_ticket_aerial_boost.name: Ticket to Aerial Boost
paradise_ticket_aerial_boost.description: Activate this card to bounce atop fluffy clouds, grabbing quoins as you journey upwards.

paradise_ticket_arbor_hollow.name: Ticket to Arbor Hollow
paradise_ticket_arbor_hollow.description: Activate this card to climb to the tall of Arbor Hollow, grabbing quoins on the way up AND back down.

paradise_ticket_beam_me_down.name: Ticket to Beam Me Down
paradise_ticket_beam_me_down.description: Activate this card to begin your descent! Grab quoins as you glide, with the help of some unidentifiable friends.

paradise_ticket_bippity_bop.name: Ticket to Bippity Bop
paradise_ticket_bippity_bop.description: Activate this card to bounce along a fluffy, joyful skyscape! You'll probably get some quoins out of it too.

paradise_ticket_cloud_flight.name: Ticket to Cloud Flight
paradise_ticket_cloud_flight.description: Activate this card to sail about Cloud Flight. Tickle the tree-tops, collecting quoins as you fly.

paradise_ticket_cloud_rings.name: Ticket to Cloud Rings
paradise_ticket_cloud_rings.description: Activate this card to glide through soft cloud rings, collecting quoins as you go. Don't forget to enjoy the view!

paradise_ticket_drafty_uplift.name: Ticket to Drafty Uplift
paradise_ticket_drafty_uplift.description: Activate this card to chill out and enjoy a good joke. It's the little things that make life great, champ.

paradise_ticket_mountain_scaling.name: Ticket to Mountain Scaling
paradise_ticket_mountain_scaling.description: Activate this card to traipse along the tippity-top of a mountain landscape. Try not to fall down into the clouds!

paradise_ticket_radial_heights.name: Ticket to Radial Heights
paradise_ticket_radial_heights.description: Activate this card to spiral through Radial Heights. Find all the stars, and see what awaits!

paradise_ticket_sky_plunge.name: Ticket to Sky Plunge
paradise_ticket_sky_plunge.description: Activate this card to take the Sky Plunge! Swiftly drop through morning clouds, collecting quoins as you fall.

paradise_ticket_slip_n_slide.name: Ticket to Slip 'N Slide
paradise_ticket_slip_n_slide.description: Activate this card to frolic amidst the snowy hills of this winter wonderland. Can you play a tune as you collect the quoins?

paradise_ticket_starlit_night.name: Ticket to Starlit Night
paradise_ticket_starlit_night.description: Activate this card to float through Starlit Night. Play a twinkling melody as you collect quoins among the stars.

paradise_ticket_updraft.name: Ticket to Updraft
paradise_ticket_updraft.description: Activate this card to ride the strong wind emanating from a mysterious cloud-hole in the sky. Glide right, and grab those quoins!

pareidolic_cosma_toast.name: Pareidolic Giant Image on Toast
pareidolic_cosma_toast.description: A piece of toast with what some people claim is an image of Cosma. Initially bought on GleBay.

party_atm.name: Party ATM
party_atm.description: The party don't stop 'til I walk in.

party_pack_aquarius.name: Aquarius Party Pack
party_pack_aquarius.description: Swim, float & drift your way around this quoin-laden party space. And, remember … quoining is always more fun with friends!

party_pack_double_rainbow.name: Double Rainbow Party Pack
party_pack_double_rainbow.description: One ephemeral cute-as-a-button party space, perfect for private events. When activated, temporary party location includes complimentary mineables, munchables and mixables, sparkles and lollipops and glee.

party_pack_mazzala_gala.name: Mazza'la Gala Party Pack
party_pack_mazzala_gala.description: One private and transient five-room wooden party lodge. When activated, temporary party location includes DIY hearty party feast, beer, booze, and one very dark make-out room.

party_pack_nylon_phool.name: Nylon Phool Party Pack
party_pack_nylon_phool.description: One temporary underwater pool-party spot. When activated, this ephemeral party place includes a complimentary DIY juice bar, smoothie-zone and Spicy Grog spot, replenishing nibbles and unlimited floatiness.

party_pack_pitchen_lilliputt.name: Pitchen Lilliputt Party Pack
party_pack_pitchen_lilliputt.description: Miniature Ur for Glitchean giants in one small but perfectly formed temporary party location. When activated, this ephemeral party spot includes minables, nibbles, snacks and sammiches, and one DIY fancy-cocktail bar.

party_pack_taster_aquarius.name: Aquarius Party Pack Taster
party_pack_taster_aquarius.description: Swim, float & drift your way around this quoin-laden party space. And, remember … quoining is always more fun with friends!

party_pack_taster_double_rainbow.name: Double Rainbow Party Pack Taster
party_pack_taster_double_rainbow.description: One ephemeral cute-as-a-button party space, perfect for private events. When activated, temporary party location includes complimentary mineables, munchables and mixables, sparkles and lollipops and glee.

party_pack_taster_mazzala_gala.name: Mazza'la Gala Party Pack Taster
party_pack_taster_mazzala_gala.description: One private and transient five-room wooden party lodge. When activated, temporary party location includes DIY hearty party feast, beer, booze, and one very dark make-out room.

party_pack_taster_nylon_phool.name: Nylon Phool Party Pack Taster
party_pack_taster_nylon_phool.description: One temporary underwater pool-party spot. When activated, this ephemeral party place includes a complimentary DIY juice bar, smoothie-zone and Spicy Grog spot, replenishing nibbles and unlimited floatiness.

party_pack_taster_pitchen_lilliputt.name: Pitchen Lilliputt Party Pack Taster
party_pack_taster_pitchen_lilliputt.description: Miniature Ur for Glitchean giants in one small but perfectly formed temporary party location. When activated, this ephemeral party spot includes minables, nibbles, snacks and sammiches, and one DIY fancy-cocktail bar.

party_pack_taster_toxic_moon.name: Toxic Moon Party Pack Taster
party_pack_taster_toxic_moon.description: One secluded and totally transient lunar location. When activated, temporary party spot includes ingredients for cocktails, sparkly rocks for space-mining, and a notable lack of gravity, for super-awesome-space-jumpiness.

party_pack_taster_val_holla.name: Val Holla Party Pack Taster
party_pack_taster_val_holla.description: Soar to new heights in this quoin-heavy party space. Grab a bunch of your closest friends, and get ready to Party Shardy!

party_pack_taster_winter_wingding.name: Winter Wingding Party Pack Taster
party_pack_taster_winter_wingding.description: One temporary wonderland, perfect for holiday get-togethers and winterly fun. When activated, this icy private party spot includes trees for decorating, ingredients for heart-warming drinkables and a DIY pie bar.

party_pack_toxic_moon.name: Toxic Moon Party Pack
party_pack_toxic_moon.description: One secluded and totally transient lunar location. When activated, temporary party spot includes ingredients for cocktails, sparkly rocks for space-mining, and a notable lack of gravity, for super-awesome-space-jumpiness.

party_pack_val_holla.name: Val Holla Party Pack
party_pack_val_holla.description: Soar to new heights in this quoin-heavy party space. Grab a bunch of your closest friends, and get ready to Party Shardy!

party_pack_winter_wingding.name: Winter Wingding Party Pack
party_pack_winter_wingding.description: One temporary wonderland, perfect for holiday get-togethers and winterly fun. When activated, this icy private party spot includes trees for decorating, ingredients for heart-warming drinkables and a DIY pie bar.

patch.name: Patch
patch.description: A humble, weedy patch. With a spade you can dig it, a hoe you can tend it, and, with a bean, even grow a tree in it. (NB: Trees are delicate organisms, and beans will only consent to being planted in the correct region.)

patch_dark.name: Dark Patch
patch_dark.description: An underground patch. As in "subterranean", rather than "clandestine". Perfect for planting anything that flourishes in the shade. Or rather 'the one thing that flourishes in the shade'.

peat.name: Block of Peat
peat.description: After eons of sitting in the bog -- condensing, compacting and quietly conducting Peaty business -- this dense stinky block should be used to boost building projects.

peat_1.name: Peat Bog
peat_1.description: Filled with a substance thicker than soil and wetter than loam, each bog gradually replenishes itself, but can only be harvested by each peat-parasite once a day (or twice, with a certain upgrade card).

peat_2.name: Peat Bog
peat_2.description: Filled with a substance thicker than soil and wetter than loam, each bog gradually replenishes itself, but can only be harvested by each peat-parasite once a day (or twice, with a certain upgrade card).

peat_3.name: Peat Bog
peat_3.description: Filled with a substance thicker than soil and wetter than loam, each bog gradually replenishes itself, but can only be harvested by each peat-parasite once a day (or twice, with a certain upgrade card).

pepitas.name: Roasted Pepitas
pepitas.description: Crunchy, nutty, seeds pulled from a pumpkin ready roasted (it must be that hot knife you used). May cause a roasted pumpkin to grow in your stomach. No, not really. Will cause you to feel smug about your healthy snacking choices, though.

petrified_rock_large.name: Large Petrified Rock
petrified_rock_large.description: A once-stable living rock, shocked and shaken to its very core by witnessing a truly awesome feat, and drawn to the 13 who contributed the most awe to the act. The pulverising and rejigging of its internal components mean that, when cracked open, a large selection of rare delights may be recovered.

petrified_rock_medium.name: Medium Petrified Rock
petrified_rock_medium.description: A once-vibrant medium-sized rock, shocked into a state of frozen fossilized awe when it witnessed an epic feat, and drawn, like a magnet, to the generous contributors who brought about the most awe. The fragile structure of elements in its core suggest that a modest selection of rare delights may be found when it is cracked open.

petrified_rock_small.name: Small Petrified Rock
petrified_rock_small.description: A once-modest small rock, frozen into a state of petrified awe when it witnessed a truly epic feat, then drawn, like a magnet, to the contributors of whatever act of rock-debilitating awesomenity petrified it. When cracked open, a small selection of rare delights may be found.

phantom_glitch.name: Phantom Glitch
phantom_glitch.description: A lonely phantom Glitch, half-thought up and forgotten by the Giants.

pi.name: Pi
pi.description: The recipe for Pi was described in ancient times by Alphimedes of Salatu, who also purportedly invented a heat ray for attacking the Rook. (If the heat ray ever existed, it has long since been lost.) It was later improved upon by Ludolph the Cerulean, named for his bright blue skin. Ludolph gave a Pi to several of the giants. Tii immediately stated that Pi was irrational. Pot, on the other hand, declared this to be the best pie he’d ever eaten - transcendental, in fact.

pick.name: Pick
pick.description: A relatively sturdy pick, without which mining cannot be done. A plain pick takes care of business, but it's not designed to last.

pig_bait.name: Pig Bait
pig_bait.description: A sack of tempting pig bait. It can be used to try to capture wild piggies.

piggy_egg.name: Piggy Egg
piggy_egg.description: An egg seasoned with special porcine spices to hatch a Piglet.

piggy_feeder.name: Piggy Feeder
piggy_feeder.description: A piggy feeder is a must-have device for lazy farmers. It will feed your pigs while you are away.

piglet.name: Piglet
piglet.description: One wiggly little piggly. He wants to turn into a big pig. Feed him nourishing plant-y food to help him grow.

pinch_of_salt.name: Pinch of Salt
pinch_of_salt.description: A tiny pinch of very salty salt.

plain_bubble.name: Plain Bubble
plain_bubble.description: A common, ordinary, plain bubble harvested from Bubble Tree.

plain_crystal.name: Plain Crystal
plain_crystal.description: It shimmers, it glitters, and it's worth a good few currants, but you can't help but think that for a crystal, it's a little bland. Not that you're complaining.

plain_metal.name: Plain Metal Ingot
plain_metal.description: Sure, this metal is plain, but with the aid of Alchemical Tongs, Alchemy II and a secret blend of elemental ingredients, more exciting metal materials can be made.

plank.name: Plank
plank.description: A plain wooden plank with many uses.

plate_of_beans.name: Plate of Beans
plate_of_beans.description: Just a plate of beans, as you can see.

play_cube.name: Play Cube
play_cube.description: Play Cubes are famous the world over. Re-live some of your favorite quest memories with one simple click. Don't waste another minute, play with your cube now!

plop.name: Piggy Plop
plop.description: Piggy plop is the delicately scented excrescence of a healthy piggy. Round, brown, and mysterious, it may contain presents.

pot.name: Pot
pot.description: A sturdy cooking pot. Required for most recipes.

potato_patty.name: Potato Patty
potato_patty.description: One potato, mashed and fried in a pleasing disc shape.

potcorn.name: Potcorn
potcorn.description: Pot corn is a regular corn made to pop because its kernels have a hard moisture-sealed hull and a dense starchy interior. This allows pressure to build inside the kernel until an explosive "pop" results.

potians_feast.name: Potian's Feast
potians_feast.description: The greatest, most magnificent, energy-filled, Pot-approved combination of nourishment. A fitting dish to make or eat for any serious Potian.

potion_alphabet_sauce.name: Alphabet Sauce
potion_alphabet_sauce.description: You know what you want to say? In the right place, by pouring the right equipment on the ground (this equipment) and the right number of friends willing to step through it to get a letter of that thing, you can make that happen. Just make sure you can trust them to stand in the right order, then take a Snap, and the benefits will be felt all round.

potion_amorous_philtre.name: Amorous Philtre
potion_amorous_philtre.description: A sensual - and highly infectious - blend of natural ingredients that stimulate the positive mood-memory receptors of the Glitchate Brain. Smells like macaroons.

potion_ancestral_spirits.name: Ancestral Spirits
potion_ancestral_spirits.description: Steadies the nerves and steels the soul against the onset of Ancestral Nostalgia.

potion_animal_youth.name: Potion of Animal Youth
potion_animal_youth.description: Animals, anxious about aging and longing for childhood, can be soothed by application of this potion: the only effusion with the proven ability to turn back time.

potion_avatar_large.name: Embiggenifying Potion
potion_avatar_large.description: "A noble potion embiggenifies the smallest glitch" reads the tiny label on this tinier bottle. Embiggenifies, you ask? "Yes" say the voices of the ancients, drifting to you through the sour aftersmell of the potion, "Embiggenifies. It is a perfectly cromulent word." For creating an embiggenifying cloud wherever you choose.

potion_avatar_mixup.name: Phreaky Philter
potion_avatar_mixup.description: A potion crafted entirely for lovers of perfectly delicious chaos. Go ahead. Switch it up! You know you want to.

potion_avatar_small.name: De-Embiggenifying Potion
potion_avatar_small.description: When poured on the floor, it releases a very pleasant scent (a strange mixture of cherry tart, custard, pineapple, roast turkey, toffee, and hot buttered toast) and a cloud causing people to feel most curious, like they're shutting up like a telescope or some such.

potion_charades.name: Charades Potion
potion_charades.description: A classic 'Parlour Potion', this benefits those surrounding the quaffer more than the quaffer themselves - but only if they can guess the word that unlocks the effect.

potion_chris.name: Door Drink
potion_chris.description: The most bewildering of all potions, the dark alchemical secrets brewed into this potent brew can produce (and destroy) mysterious doors to far-off lands. You'll find yourself leaping from place to place, never knowing where the next leap may lead you.

potion_draught_of_giant_amicability.name: Draught of Giant Am1cability
potion_draught_of_giant_amicability.description: An old rare version of the Draught, which also causes the quaffer to smell like stardust, hot sauce, whiskers on kittens and several other of the Giants' favourite things, thus granting a modicum of favor from the Giant the potion happens to be most amicable with. Shake up to three times a day to shift Giant affinity. Do not exceed one quaff a day.

potion_elixir_of_avarice.name: Elixir of Avarice
potion_elixir_of_avarice.description: A natural blend that increases one's appetite for Quoins. Dosage: effective up to one potion per day.

potion_favor.name: Draught of Giant Amicability
potion_favor.description: Causes the quaffer to smell like stardust, hot sauce, whiskers on kittens and several other of the Giants' favourite things, thus granting a modicum of favor from the Giant the potion happens to be most amicable with. Shake up to three times a day to shift Giant affinity. Do not exceed one quaff a day.

potion_garden_clear.name: Liquid Super-Hoe
potion_garden_clear.description: A bag full of hoes might be able to clear your whole garden, a bottle of Liquid Super-Hoe has more clearing power than any common old hoe-bag. One drop will clear all the plots that can be cleared from the nearest garden.

potion_garden_fertilize.name: Dung-Kicker Drops
potion_garden_fertilize.description: One squirt of Dung-Kicker Drops spreads fertilizer over all fertilizable plots in a garden (no extra guano necessary), leaving you free to enjoy more pleasant-scented parts of the gardening experience.

potion_garden_harvest.name: Manyharvest Cordial
potion_garden_harvest.description: Like a delicate tornado, one drop of Manyharvest Cordial will gently gather all ripe crops from the nearest garden (while, like a twister filled with generosity, giving you all the usual 'super-harvest' bonuses).

potion_garden_plant.name: Seed-Dibber Libation
potion_garden_plant.description: Just one dose of this patented Seed-Dibber Libation will plant every available plot of the nearest garden with your chosen seed (if you have enough seeds available). Save your fingernails for pretty things, eh?

potion_garden_water.name: Soak-All Solution
potion_garden_water.description: A single drop of Soak-All Solution (a tiny bottle filled with matter wetter than wet itself) will water every plot in the nearest garden with only a flick of the wrist.

potion_keycutter_tonic.name: Keycutter Tonic
potion_keycutter_tonic.description: With a sharp metallic taste and acidic fizz, this is a concoction so strong that the fumes given off it when quaffed carve keys into the shape of other keys.

potion_rainbow_juice.name: Rainbow Juice
potion_rainbow_juice.description: Where is the end of the rainbow? Apparently, in this bottle. Warning: may produce curious disruptive effect on air around it. Thus the term, 'Anti-Gravity Rainbow'.

potion_rocky_regeneration_solution.name: Rocky Regeneration Solution
potion_rocky_regeneration_solution.description: A powerful stimulant for nubbin regeneration. NB: Does not work on rock roots, only on partially mined rock-remains.

potion_rook_balm.name: Rook Balm
potion_rook_balm.description: Originally marketed under the less classy RUK-B-GONE, this potion, post-rebrand, does precisely the same job - emergency full healing of any rooked critter or tree.

potion_trantsformation_fluid.name: Trantsformation Fluid
potion_trantsformation_fluid.description: A tree-reassignment liquor, capable of soaking into the roots of any tree or plant and silently, smelllessly, "almost" harmlessly rearranging its DNA.

potion_tree_poison.name: Tree Poison
potion_tree_poison.description: Thick glass conceals a dark truth: the death sentence for five trees. But really, since the inevitable broom of death clears the way for new life, isn't it actually just "a life sentence for five NEW trees"? No, it's mainly just tree poison.

potion_tree_poison_antidote.name: Tree Poison Antidote
potion_tree_poison_antidote.description: Tree antidote: the only known reprieve for the mostly dead tree (there's a big difference between "mostly dead" and "all dead"). Contains five sips at the last chance saloon for five lucky trees.

potion_xp.name: Draught of Wisdom
potion_xp.description: Powerful potion packed with tinctures and guano, and knowledge. Follows ancient potioneering law that anything tasting quite this unpleasant must be good for you.

potoxin.name: Potoxin
potoxin.description: A compound made out of red, green and blue.

pottine.name: Pottine
pottine.description: So wrong. But so, so right.

powder_of_mild_fecundity.name: Powder of Mild Fecundity
powder_of_mild_fecundity.description: The dust in this jar of reasonably fecund powder gets up the noses of piggies, butterflies and chickens (up to a point, there is only so much dust) and causes them to shed small amounts of their edibles everywhere.

powder_of_startling_fecundity.name: Powder of Startling Fecundity
powder_of_startling_fecundity.description: This jar of high-potency powder gets under the skin of piggies, chickens and butterflies (up to a limit, one dose can only irritate a certain number of animals) and causes them to fecund their edibles all OVER the place.

precious_potato_salad.name: Precious Potato Salad
precious_potato_salad.description: Potato salad, traditionally an affordable staple at Glitchen birthdays, is now fit for fancy dinners and lavish banquets with the addition of the particularly precious Trump Rub.

proper_rice.name: Proper Rice
proper_rice.description: A steaming bowl of slightly sticky rice.

pumpkin.name: Pumpkin
pumpkin.description: One plump and thick-skinned pumpkin. Perfect for carving, mulching, munching, and, in times of need, for using as a carriage drawn by tamed gerbils.

pumpkin_ale.name: Pumpkin Ale
pumpkin_ale.description: All the refreshment of beer combined with the autumnal savoury heft of pumpkin. Then combined with cinnamon. For no reason anyone can decipher.

pumpkin_carved_1.name: Jack the Pumpkin
pumpkin_carved_1.description: Part-vegetable, part-sprite, this is Jack. He makes you feel a little autumnal, a little festive, and a little like your soul might get dragged, screaming, from your sleeping body.

pumpkin_carved_2.name: Steve the Pumpkin
pumpkin_carved_2.description: A widely-grinning pumpkin, ready to party (with the addition of fireflies). Could be accessorised with a pile of pepitas to make a puking pumpkin, but that's a matter of taste. Or lack of taste. Whatever.

pumpkin_carved_3.name: Hello Pumpkin!
pumpkin_carved_3.description: The only hollowed out vegetable so cute you'd happily put it in your pocket and carry it around all day. Or at least, you would if it didn't weigh 50lb and smell of decomposing food. Hello Pumpkin!

pumpkin_carved_4.name: Zille the Pumpkin
pumpkin_carved_4.description: A traditional Zilloween decoration, this is a common-or-garden pumpkin carved into a representation of Zille, giant of mountains and mining. Already pretty magical, it will become more magical with the addition of fireflies.

pumpkin_carved_5.name: Lem the Pumpkin
pumpkin_carved_5.description: To mark the special relationship between the Lemmites and the Zillots, the Lem Pumpkin was created by a particularly talented Lemmite carver named Myuki. Zille, apparently, was unimpressed at this sharing of her holiday. But Lem loved it.

pumpkin_lit_1.name: Jack-O-Lantern
pumpkin_lit_1.description: A carved pumpkin lit from the inside with the power of fireflies. You'd think this would make it look more warm and comforting. But no, still terrifying (for a vegetable).

pumpkin_lit_2.name: Steve-O-Lantern
pumpkin_lit_2.description: A gurning, gape-mouthed, firefly-filled glowing pumpkin, smelling of decomposing root, and overcooked vegetables. How very seasonal.

pumpkin_lit_3.name: Shiny Hello Pumpkin!
pumpkin_lit_3.description: A brightly-lit cute kitty pumpkin lantern. As cute as a vegetable that has been set about with a knife until it resembles an animal and then set on fire with a face full of insects can be. Pretty cute then!

pumpkin_lit_4.name: Zille-O-Lantern
pumpkin_lit_4.description: A common seasonal vegetable carved into a representation of Zille, and filled with fireflies to create an eerie glow. And it IS eerie. If you squint, it's like her eyes (and the burny pumpkin smell) are following you around the room.

pumpkin_lit_5.name: Lem-O-Lantern
pumpkin_lit_5.description: An unusual addition to Zilloween, the Lem-O-Lantern, marking the special relationship between Zillots and Lemmites, has long been created for the festival by vegetablartistes. It is especially prized, as it uses a special flick of the pick known as "The Myuki Technique".

pumpkin_pie.name: Pumpkin Pie
pumpkin_pie.description: When people use the phrase 'as nice as pie', they are, in fact, talking about this pie. What goes into it? Fresh pumpkin, crispy pastry, spicy spices, and a big dollop of love. (That's an attitude rather than a hidden ingredient, before you start feeling nauseous).

quest_req_icon_letterblock.name: Quest Log icon: Four Letter Words, Word Up

quest_req_icon_teleport.name: Teleportation Point
quest_req_icon_teleport.description: To use teleportation, click on your familiar (or press F).

quest_req_icon_teleport_with_followers.name: Teleporting with Followers
quest_req_icon_teleport_with_followers.description: To teleport with followers, ask other Glitches to follow you and then teleport as usual.

quill.name: Quill
quill.description: This fancy quill (and the skill of Penpersonship) will let you write messages and notes. And maybe give yourself inky fingers.

race_ticket.name: Race Ticket
race_ticket.description: Challenge another player to a race.

race_ticket_amazing_race.name: Amazing Race Ticket
race_ticket_amazing_race.description: Challenge another player to the Amazing Race.

race_ticket_canyon_run.name: Canyon Run Ticket
race_ticket_canyon_run.description: Challenge another player to Canyon Run.

race_ticket_crystal_climb.name: Crystal Climb Ticket
race_ticket_crystal_climb.description: Challenge another player to Crystal Climb.

race_ticket_grab_em_good.name: Grab 'Em Good Ticket
race_ticket_grab_em_good.description: Challenge another player to Grab 'Em Good.

race_ticket_hogtie_piggy.name: The Great Hog Haul Ticket
race_ticket_hogtie_piggy.description: Challenge another player to The Great Hog Haul.

race_ticket_it_game.name: Game of Crowns Ticket
race_ticket_it_game.description: Challenge another player to Game of Crowns.

race_ticket_lava_leap.name: Lava Leap Ticket
race_ticket_lava_leap.description: Challenge another player to Lava Leap.

race_ticket_space_race.name: Space Race Ticket
race_ticket_space_race.description: Challenge another player to Space Race.

race_ticket_star_sprint.name: Star Sprint Ticket
race_ticket_star_sprint.description: Challenge another player to Star Sprint.

race_ticket_time_warp.name: Time Warp Ticket
race_ticket_time_warp.description: Challenge another player to Time Warp.

random_kindness.name: Random Kindness
random_kindness.description: This priceless item dispenses random kindness.

red.name: Red
red.description: Some things are so basic, so fundamental that they only need one word to describe what they are. This perfect blend of tomato, onion and butterfly milk sums up the essence of red.

rice.name: Rice
rice.description: A pot of freshly made rice.

rich_tagine.name: Rich Tagine
rich_tagine.description: A steaming pot of zesty, slow-cooked tagine.

rock_beryl_1.name: Beryl Rock
rock_beryl_1.description: A mineral dull in colour if not composite, Beryl can generally be found underground, where its eerie green surface calls to miners, refiners and gem collectors alike.

rock_beryl_2.name: Beryl Rock
rock_beryl_2.description: A mineral dull in colour if not composite, Beryl can generally be found underground, where its eerie green surface calls to miners, refiners and gem collectors alike.

rock_beryl_3.name: Beryl Rock
rock_beryl_3.description: A mineral dull in colour if not composite, Beryl can generally be found underground, where its eerie green surface calls to miners, refiners and gem collectors alike.

rock_dullite_1.name: Dullite Rock
rock_dullite_1.description: A study in shades of grey, gray, and a monochromatic 8-bit scale of debatable spelling, this common rock is mostly found underground, is minable, and may contain precious gems.

rock_dullite_2.name: Dullite Rock
rock_dullite_2.description: A study in shades of grey, gray, and a monochromatic 8-bit scale of debatable spelling, this common rock is mostly found underground, is minable, and may contain precious gems.

rock_dullite_3.name: Dullite Rock
rock_dullite_3.description: A study in shades of grey, gray, and a monochromatic 8-bit scale of debatable spelling, this common rock is mostly found underground, is minable, and may contain precious gems.

rock_metal_1.name: Metal Rock
rock_metal_1.description: A stupefying combination of classic rock and the power of metal. Most often found in rocky areas, these heavyweights are indispensable in the production of ingots and the metallurgic arts.

rock_metal_2.name: Metal Rock
rock_metal_2.description: A stupefying combination of classic rock and the power of metal. Most often found in rocky areas, these heavyweights are indispensable in the production of ingots and the metallurgic arts.

rock_metal_3.name: Metal Rock
rock_metal_3.description: A stupefying combination of classic rock and the power of metal. Most often found in rocky areas, these heavyweights are indispensable in the production of ingots and the metallurgic arts.

rock_sparkly_1.name: Sparkly Rock
rock_sparkly_1.description: The most desperate-to-be-loved mineral you could ever hope to meet, this minable mini-mountain brings a touch of disco to out-of-the-way places. Full of high-value chunks and crushable minerals, every major miner seeks their own vein of sparkly.

rock_sparkly_2.name: Sparkly Rock
rock_sparkly_2.description: The most desperate-to-be-loved mineral you could ever hope to meet, this minable mini-mountain brings a touch of disco to out-of-the-way places. Full of high-value chunks and crushable minerals, every major miner seeks their own vein of sparkly.

rock_sparkly_3.name: Sparkly Rock
rock_sparkly_3.description: The most desperate-to-be-loved mineral you could ever hope to meet, this minable mini-mountain brings a touch of disco to out-of-the-way places. Full of high-value chunks and crushable minerals, every major miner seeks their own vein of sparkly.

rook_egg.name: Rook Egg
rook_egg.description: It is unusual you get to see purveyors of chaos and destruction in a self contained ovoid form, but here one is. This would make an impressive omelette. A giant one that tasted of darkness, and smelled like woe.

rookswort.name: Rookswort
rookswort.description: An exotic bud with a pleasantly lasting aftertaste of danger and chaos.

rube_potato.name: Rube Shaped Potato
rube_potato.description: A spud that's a dud, with the self-evolved claim to resemble a rubbed-on Rube. Miraculous! Fries not included.

rubemycin.name: Rubemycin
rubemycin.description: A compound made out of red, green, blue and shiny.

rubeweed.name: Rubeweed
rubeweed.description: A deceptively dull green shoot filled with lucky sap.

salmon.name: Pocket Salmon
salmon.description: It's like salmon, but in your pocket! Pocket Salmon! The handy friendly fish-at-your-fingertips that's always ready to go! Why settle for boring old underwater catch-me-if-you-calmon-salmon when you could have the ever-accessible, always-dependable, never-stinky always-yummy Pocket Salmon instead! POCKET SALMON! [TM. Always read the label. Terms and conditions apply]

salmon_jaella.name: Salmon Jaella
salmon_jaella.description: An assortment of fresh Salmon from Jal, Rice, Legumes and veggies thrown together into a dish Jal-loving Glitchen identify themselves by.

saucepan.name: Saucepan
saucepan.description: A saucepan is a must-have item for making sauces.

savory_smoothie.name: Savory Smoothie
savory_smoothie.description: A savory smoothie. It sticks to your ribs and doesn't let go.

scraper.name: Scraper
scraper.description: Wielding only this hardy flat-edged blade, a song in their heart and a will to succeed, anyone can boast a backpack of Barnacles or a pocket full of Ice. Why that glitch might want a clacking bag and potentially wet pants is not the problem of the scraper. Scraper just scrapes.

secret_sauce.name: Secret Sauce
secret_sauce.description: An enigmatic jar full of mysteriously yummy secret sauce.

seed_broccoli.name: Broccoli Seed
seed_broccoli.description: A packet of broccoli seeds. This can be planted to grow Broccoli in a Crop Garden.

seed_cabbage.name: Cabbage Seed
seed_cabbage.description: A packet of cabbage seeds. This can be planted to grow Cabbages in a Crop Garden.

seed_carrot.name: Carrot Seed
seed_carrot.description: A packet of carrot seeds. This can be planted to grow Carrot in a Crop Garden.

seed_corn.name: Corn Seed
seed_corn.description: A packet of corn seeds. This can be planted to grow Corn in a Crop Garden.

seed_cucumber.name: Cucumber Seed
seed_cucumber.description: A packet of cucumber seeds. This can be planted to grow Cucumbers in a Crop Garden.

seed_onion.name: Onion Seed
seed_onion.description: A packet of black onion seeds. This can be planted to grow Onions in a Crop Garden.

seed_parsnip.name: Parsnip Seed
seed_parsnip.description: A packet of parsnip seeds. This can be planted to grow Parsnips in a Crop Garden.

seed_potato.name: Potato Seed
seed_potato.description: A packet of tiny potatoes. This can be planted to grow Potatoes in a Crop Garden.

seed_pumpkin.name: Pumpkin Seed
seed_pumpkin.description: A packet of Pumpkin seeds. This can be planted to grow one mighty Pumpkin at a time in either a Crop Garden or a Herb garden.

seed_rice.name: Rice Seed
seed_rice.description: A packet of rice seeds. This can be planted to grow Rice in a Crop Garden.

seed_spinach.name: Spinach Seed
seed_spinach.description: A packet of spinach seeds. This can be planted to grow Spinach in a Crop Garden.

seed_strawberry.name: Spoiled Strawberry Seed
seed_strawberry.description: A packet of spoiled strawberry seeds. While it once contained fruity ovaries and potential for life, this item has lost its ability to grow delicious red fruit and is now only fit for donation.

seed_tomato.name: Tomato Seed
seed_tomato.description: A packet of heirloom-quality tomato seeds. This can be planted to grow Tomatoes in a Crop Garden.

seed_zucchini.name: Zucchini Seed
seed_zucchini.description: A packet of zucchini seeds. This can be planted to grow Zucchinis in a Crop Garden.

set_square.name: Set Square
set_square.description: This is a lost artifact, known only through ancient stories of long-deceased ancestors, and has not been discovered in Ur. Every house in every quarter of every neighbourhood that existed under the scrutinizing eye of Tii had a set square. Without at least one per household a life of trying to please the precision-loving giant would have been completely impossible. This particular set-square, measured and calibrated to within an inch of madness by Marley LeChuck, was one of the finest set squares ever created, judged as both the squarest and settiest in the annual Tii Ceremony.

shovel.name: Shovel
shovel.description: An essential for anyone that calls a spade a shovel, this simple tool masterpiece can be used to harvest Peat, dig for dirt (well, Earth), and occasionally land a juicy piece of Loam.

silvertongue.name: Silvertongue
silvertongue.description: A blue sparkly bloom of joy.

simple_bbq.name: Simple BBQ
simple_bbq.description: Some hot meat with tangy sauce.

slow_gin_fizz.name: Slow Gin Fizz
slow_gin_fizz.description: A low and lazy slow gin fizz.

small_worthless.name: Small shiny object with no intrinsic value
small_worthless.description: Shiny, but you can barely see the shine so it ends up a little dull. Totally worthless: it has no purpose. Holding on to this little object simply cannot be recommended.

smelter.name: Smelter
smelter.description: Extracting purest metal from even the dullest chunk of Metal Rock, this classic Smelter is the second step to creating all manner of exciting secondary metals. (Learning Smelting is step one.)

snack_pack.name: Snack Pack
snack_pack.description: An apple, some cheese, and a couple of pickles. Not quite a meal, but it'll do until dinner.

snail.name: Snail
snail.description: Part-screw, part-nail (and managing to combine the less useful parts of both), snails are the product of a Sloth getting private time with metal rods.

sneezing_powder.name: Sneezing Powder
sneezing_powder.description: A potentially troublesome jar of sneezing powder.

sno_cone_blue.name: Blue Sno Cone
sno_cone_blue.description: A delicious, refreshing Blue Sno Cone with a tangy hit of iMG. Blended to perfection using ice, hooch, and the very finest elemental additives and preservatives, it tastes exactly what the the concept of blue should taste like. And a little like raspberry, weirdly.

sno_cone_green.name: Green Sno Cone
sno_cone_green.description: A bright green blend of ice, hooch and elements make a drink the color of days when spring is born, or nights when the northern lights perform. Packed with a modest hit of iMG, winter cannot fade it. Mainly because it's 40% elemental additives and preservatives.

sno_cone_orange.name: Orange Sno Cone
sno_cone_orange.description: A chillingly refreshing bright Orange Sno Cone, with a medium amount of iMG. A perfect blend of Ice, Hooch, and elemental additives and preservatives, it is the epitome of an orange drink. Not orange the fruit, that is, orange the colour. It's more of a concept.

sno_cone_purple.name: Purple Sno Cone
sno_cone_purple.description: A refreshing and delicious purple Sno Cone. A sophisticated blend of Ice, Hooch and elemental additives and preservatives. Now you too can get all the social frisson of Purple but with none of the nutritional or mental expansion benefits (contains considerable iMG, though).

sno_cone_rainbow.name: Rainbo Sno Cone
sno_cone_rainbow.description: A rainbo in Sno Cone form, eating this blend of all the other Sno Cones makes your tongue tingle, your sinuses snigger and your spine spontaneously decide to go on a tropical vacation to Shimmyville. Warning: Contains gloriously high levels of iMG.

sno_cone_red.name: Red Sno Cone
sno_cone_red.description: A tongue-tingling spine-shiveringly Red Sno Cone. A seamless blend of Ice, Hooch, and a secret blend of elemental additives, preservatives, iMG and raw energy that make you feel slightly, though not to any copyright-infringing extent, like you may have wings.

sparkle_powder.name: Sparkle Powder
sparkle_powder.description: A shimmery jar of sparkle powder.

sparkly.name: Chunk of Sparkly
sparkly.description: It's a pleasantly twinkly chunk of sparkly!

special_item_that_only_beta_testers_get.name: Special Item That Only Beta Testers Get
special_item_that_only_beta_testers_get.description: Best selling toy in a year that the historians have glossed over, sales plummeted when it was discovered that many of the advertised functions of Señor Funpickle could cause injury, death, or severe unpopularity. Hastily rebranded, the remaining stock were quietly farmed out as commemorative free gifts at a time known as "The Great Reset".

spice_mill.name: Spice Mill
spice_mill.description: A basic spice mill for converting basic allspice into other more exciting spices.

spicy_grog.name: Spicy Grog
spicy_grog.description: A tall glass of exceedingly spicy grog.

spigot.name: Spigot
spigot.description: Technically, the Spigot is like a bung, but with a tap. A tapped bung, tapered to accurately fit a Still's bunghole, this spigot is carefully calibrated to control the flow of moonshine from a fresh distilled batch. It's also, for the record, a very fun word to say. Spigot. Spigot.

spinach.name: Spinach
spinach.description: Hearty green spinach. It's strong to the finich.

spindle.name: Spindle
spindle.description: In the mists of time, storytellers spoke of a magical spindle that could be used to spin starlight into downy threads to weave into a cloak of invisibility. But it's not this spindle. This is just a spindle. It's used to turn fibers into thread. But that other one sounds amazing, right?

splendid_spindle.name: Splendid Spindle
splendid_spindle.description: The ancients whispered of the spindle of Cosma that could spin the very fibres of air into cloths of heaven, enwrought with golden and silver light; blue and dim and dark cloths of night and light and the half-light. This is not that spindle. But it is really quite a good spindle, and it lasts longer than the other kind of spindle.

spriggase.name: Spriggase
spriggase.description: A compound made out of red, green and blue.

steak.name: Steak
steak.description: Grilled meat on a wood fire. Savory.

still.name: Still
still.description: A basic Still for converting Grain, Corn, or the humble Potato into versatile, potent (if not smooth) Hooch.

stock_sauce.name: Stock Sauce
stock_sauce.description: As plain and every day as a woman laughing while eating salad, no one even things about Stock Sauce any more. Perhaps they should.

stoot_barfield_pullstring_doll.name: Stoot Barfield Pullstring Doll
stoot_barfield_pullstring_doll.description: Stoot Barfield Pullstring Doll. Loaded with a goodly amount of "inspirational" phrases.

string.name: String
string.description: This is String. In theory, it can be used for constructing fabric, rugs, and other basic furniture items. It is a pretty good theory.

subway_gate.name: A Red Button
subway_gate.description: A button on an old ruin — but still operative! — subway gate.

subway_map.name: Subway Map
subway_map.description: Determine the lay of the land with this handy-dandy atlas of subterranean transportation destinations.

super_scraper.name: Super Scraper
super_scraper.description: Replacing the rustic charm of the bestselling original Scraper with super-streamlined barnacle-busting ice-nubbin-bustin' action, the highly desirable Super Scraper offers five times the lasting power for slightly-more-than-five-times the price. What can I say? You pay for convenience (and natty design).

super_veggie_kebabs.name: Super Veggie Kebab
super_veggie_kebabs.description: Chunks of assorted vegetables on a fun pointy stick!

swank_zucchini_loaf.name: Swank Zucchini Loaf
swank_zucchini_loaf.description: A good loaf can be made out of anything. A great loaf is made from Zucchini and talks about how rich it is.

sweet_n_sour_sauce.name: Sweet 'n' Sour Sauce
sweet_n_sour_sauce.description: Is it sweet? Is it sour? It's both! It's sweet 'n' sour sauce!

swf_1.name: SWF
swf_1.description: One of the three essential elementary thingamabobs that go into making a game. Without this one, the whatsitcalleds won't do that rendering thingy. And without that nothing works, as any fool knows.

swf_2.name: SWF
swf_2.description: One of the three necessary somethings that go into making an awesome game. Without this one, the thingmabobs won't scale to the server whatsit. And that's just not cool. So you totally want to avoid that, by having this in your game. Right?

swf_3.name: SWF
swf_3.description: One of the three vitally important widgets that go into making a game great. Without this one, the doodahs don't layer correctly, and the side-scrolling shizzle-facilitator gets all out of whack. And you don't want that.

swing_batter.name: Swing Batter
swing_batter.description: After roughly chopping with a knife, this batter is not mixed, blended or whisked, but swung at the end of the arm. Swing batter, batter batter swing, batter (as they say).

tangy_noodles.name: Tangy Noodles
tangy_noodles.description: A generous serving of zesty, lemony tangy noodles.

tangy_sauce.name: Tangy Sauce
tangy_sauce.description: A large jar of gloppy tangy sauce.

tasty_pasta.name: Tasty Pasta
tasty_pasta.description: A bowl of extra-long noodles with rich bolognese sauce.

teleportation_script.name: Teleportation Script
teleportation_script.description: A lovingly handcrafted Teleportation Script (Or "a magical location incantation scribbled on some Paper with a Quill). This will zip you on a one-way ticket to somewhere specific… as long as you have a Teleportation Token or the energy to pay for your ride.

teleportation_script_imbued.name: Imbued Teleportation Script
teleportation_script_imbued.description: Free ride! A pre-imbued teleportation script (well, a magical location-incantation scribbled on some Paper with a Quill), this will zip you on a one way ticket somewhere specific… For free! Because someone already paid for your ride.

test_game_starter.name: Game Pig
test_game_starter.description: GAME PIG IS THE BEST. GAME PIG WANTS TO PLAY FUN GAME.

test_tube.name: Test Tube
test_tube.description: If you want to turn elements into compounds, you need a handy-dandy test tube. It's totally tubular.

thread.name: Thread
thread.description: Thread, spun from Fox tail fibers, and essential in the Loomeration of String. Easily lost (but easily picked up again), smells faintly of Fox bottom.

tiite.name: Tiite
tiite.description: A compound made out of red and blue.

tincturing_kit.name: Tincturing Kit
tincturing_kit.description: Anyone who wants to beef up the benefits of herbs or create ingredients for powerful potions would do well to avail themselves of this basic Tincturing Kit and the Tincturing skill. As the name suggests, it is perfect for making tinctures. And no use at all for anything else.

tinkertool.name: Tinkertool
tinkertool.description: Are you the DIY type who likes to repair your own tools? The nitpicky type who likes to craft their own gear from scratch? Then a Tinkertool is a very handy thing for you to have.

toy_star_1.name: Star-Jingler-mid
toy_star_1.description: A star that plays a single note of mid tone for your ear pleasure. Try touching it!

toy_star_2.name: Star-Jingler-low
toy_star_2.description: A star that plays a single note of low tone for your ear pleasure. Try touching it!

trant_bean.name: Bean Tree
trant_bean.description: The good old Tree of Bean. Laden with 57 varieties of identical-looking legume, these protein-machines provide the raw ingredients for hearty chow and base material for new trees.

trant_bean_dead.name: Dead Bean Tree
trant_bean_dead.description: A tree that won't be producing any more beans.

trant_bubble.name: Bubble Tree
trant_bubble.description: The delicate Bubble Tree. Bursting with plain bubbles waiting to be tuned, these somewhat unstable specimens harbor fruit of perfect transparency - and thoughts of bizarre conspiracy.

trant_bubble_dead.name: Dead Bubble Tree
trant_bubble_dead.description: A tree that won't be producing any more bubbles.

trant_egg.name: Egg Plant
trant_egg.description: The noble Egg Plant. As is fitting to a fruit as ovoidly perfect as a prolate moon, Egg Plants (of course) can only be found underground in cool, dark places.

trant_egg_dead.name: Dead Egg Plant
trant_egg_dead.description: A tree that won't be producing any more eggs.

trant_fruit.name: Fruit Tree
trant_fruit.description: The glorious Fruit Tree. Thick with tasty cherries ripe to be converted into other delicious fruits, these venerable plants may not be chatty, but they're indispensable for fine edibles and quaffables of all sorts.

trant_fruit_dead.name: Dead Fruit Tree
trant_fruit_dead.description: A tree that won't be producing any more fruit.

trant_gas.name: Gas Plant
trant_gas.description: The ever-mellow Gas Plant. Packed with a stash of General Vapour that's just begging to be gassified. With a love of the murky and mystical, Gas Plants can often be found in totally far out spaces.

trant_gas_dead.name: Dead Gas Plant
trant_gas_dead.description: A tree that won't be producing any more gas.

trant_spice.name: Spice Plant
trant_spice.description: The delectable Spice Plant. Seductively dangling with Allspice, the millability of this simple brown seed means that everyone's favorite varietal of spice can be found bounded in one shell if you look hard enough.

trant_spice_dead.name: Dead Spice Plant
trant_spice_dead.description: A tree that won't be producing any more spices.

treasure_map_1.name: Treasure Map
treasure_map_1.description: A map to hidden treasure. Probably.

tree_poison.name: Tree Poison
tree_poison.description: A lethal concoction, if you're a tree.

tree_poison_antidote.name: Tree Poison Antidote
tree_poison_antidote.description: A powerful remedy for recently poisoned trees.

trophy_bubble.name: Bubble Trophy
trophy_bubble.description: This trophy is awarded for the plucky collection of all 4 bubbles.

trophy_cubimal.name: Cubimal Series 1 Trophy
trophy_cubimal.description: This trophy is awarded for the cubular collection of all 23 cubimals of Cubimal Series 1.

trophy_cubimal_2.name: Cubimal Series 2 Trophy
trophy_cubimal_2.description: This trophy is awarded for the cubuliscious collection of all 20 Cubimals of Cubimal Series 2.

trophy_egghunt.name: Egg Hunter Trophy
trophy_egghunt.description: This trophy is awarded to the eager egg hunter who collects all five chocolate eggs.

trophy_emblems.name: Emblem Trophy
trophy_emblems.description: This trophy is awarded for collecting all 11 Giant Emblems. Giantdamn, you are good at Glitch!

trophy_fruit.name: Fruit Trophy
trophy_fruit.description: This cup is awarded for superior efforts in the fruit collecting sciences.

trophy_gas.name: Gas Trophy
trophy_gas.description: This trophy is awarded to those who demonstrate noble dedication to gas collecting.

trophy_gem.name: Gem Trophy
trophy_gem.description: This trophy is awarded for a nigh-unnatural love of shiny things that doesn't involve putting them in one's mouth.

trophy_music_b_brown.name: BB Music Trophy
trophy_music_b_brown.description: Brilliantly Bodacious are two words often used to describe the bearer of the BB Music Trophy. Also, "Brutally Beardy", or "Big and Bouncy". Anything celebrating the finding of all five BB Music Blocks, basically.

trophy_music_d_blue.name: DB Music Trophy
trophy_music_d_blue.description: This plaque entitles the winner to bragging rights for collecting all five DB Music Blocks.

trophy_music_d_green.name: DG Music Trophy
trophy_music_d_green.description: This plaque shouts out "Look at me world! I collected all five DG Music Blocks!" Metaphorically, that is.

trophy_music_d_red.name: DR Music Trophy
trophy_music_d_red.description: Let it be known that this here plaque award thingummy honors the finding and collecting of all 5 DR Music Blocks.

trophy_music_x_shiny.name: XS Music Trophy
trophy_music_x_shiny.description: As shiny as the soul of its bearer, this plaque recognizes the meritorious Music Block collection skills of said bearer.

trophy_spice.name: Spice Trophy
trophy_spice.description: The paws of the individual holding this award are deserving of your praise, if you consider the collection of all 16 spices praiseworthy. Which you should.

trophy_street_creator_dirt.name: Street Creator Dirt Trophy
trophy_street_creator_dirt.description: This Trophy, artfully depicting a master of dirt, marks a street-building career so great that the holder collected… well, all five parts of this trophy.

trophy_street_creator_dirt_piece1.name: A Piece of Street Creator Dirt Trophy
trophy_street_creator_dirt_piece1.description: One part of a trophy for contributing to street-building. Four more parts like it, you might have a whole trophy! A Dirt Trophy. Like they say: where there's muck, there's brass.

trophy_street_creator_dirt_piece2.name: A Piece of Street Creator Dirt Trophy
trophy_street_creator_dirt_piece2.description: One part of a trophy for contributing to street-building. Four more parts like it, you might have a whole trophy! A Dirt Trophy. Like they say: where there's muck, there's brass.

trophy_street_creator_dirt_piece5.description: One part of a trophy for contributing to street-building. Four more parts like it, you might have a whole trophy! A Dirt Trophy. Like they say: where there's muck, there's brass.

trophy_street_creator_earth.name: Street Creator Earth Trophy
trophy_street_creator_earth.description: This stunning bauble marks a remarkable amount of street-building by the holder. Enough to collect all five parts of this fine Earth Trophy, at least.

trophy_street_creator_earth_piece1.name: A Piece of Street Creator Earth Trophy
trophy_street_creator_earth_piece1.description: One piece of a street-building trophy. Five different pieces of this - the Earth" Trophy - put together will make one whole ornament. Heal the earth! (Trophy)!

trophy_street_creator_earth_piece2.name: A Piece of Street Creator Earth Trophy
trophy_street_creator_earth_piece2.description: One piece of a street-building trophy. Five different pieces of this - the Earth" Trophy - put together will make one whole ornament. Heal the earth! (Trophy)!

trophy_street_creator_earth_piece5.description: One piece of a street-building trophy. Five different pieces of this - the Earth" Trophy - put together will make one whole ornament. Heal the earth! (Trophy)!

trophy_street_creator_rock.name: Street Creator Rock Trophy
trophy_street_creator_rock.description: The holder of this tchotchke has earned their reputation as a rock of the street-creation community. They also earned a patched-up trophy.

trophy_street_creator_rock_piece1.name: A Piece of Street Creator Rock Trophy
trophy_street_creator_rock_piece1.description: One fifth of a trophy celebrating top street-creators. Four more pieces similar to it, and one mighty Rock Trophy would be born.

trophy_street_creator_rock_piece2.name: A Piece of Street Creator Rock Trophy
trophy_street_creator_rock_piece2.description: One fifth of a trophy celebrating top street-creators. Four more pieces similar to it, and one mighty Rock Trophy would be born.

trophy_street_creator_rock_piece3.description: One fifth of a trophy celebrating top street-creators. Four more pieces similar to it, and one mighty Rock Trophy would be born.

trophy_street_creator_rock_piece4.description: One fifth of a trophy celebrating top street-creators. Four more pieces similar to it, and one mighty Rock Trophy would be born.

trophy_street_creator_rock_piece5.name: A Piece of Street Creator Rock Trophy
trophy_street_creator_rock_piece5.description: One fifth of a trophy celebrating top street-creators. Four more pieces similar to it, and one mighty Rock Trophy would be born.

trophy_street_creator_wood.name: Street Creator Wood Trophy
trophy_street_creator_wood.description: The holder of this trophy hard-earned each of its five fragments through assiduous street-creation activity. Hopefully it won't give splinters.

trophy_street_creator_wood_piece1.name: A Piece of Street Creator Wood Trophy
trophy_street_creator_wood_piece1.description: One fragment of a trophy (the "Wood" trophy) marking top street-creation activity. If you earned four more fragments similar to this, would you have a whole trophy? Yes: You = Wood.

trophy_street_creator_wood_piece2.name: A Piece of Street Creator Wood Trophy
trophy_street_creator_wood_piece2.description: One fragment of a trophy (the "Wood" trophy) marking top street-creation activity. If you earned four more fragments similar to this, would you have a whole trophy? Yes: You = Wood.

trophy_street_creator_wood_piece3.name: A Piece of Street Creator Wood Trophy
trophy_street_creator_wood_piece3.description: One fragment of a trophy (the "Wood" trophy) marking top street-creation activity. If you earned four more fragments similar to this, would you have a whole trophy? Yes: You = Wood.

trophy_street_creator_wood_piece4.description: One fragment of a trophy (the "Wood" trophy) marking top street-creation activity. If you earned four more fragments similar to this, would you have a whole trophy? Yes: You = Wood.

trophy_street_creator_wood_piece5.description: One fragment of a trophy (the "Wood" trophy) marking top street-creation activity. If you earned four more fragments similar to this, would you have a whole trophy? Yes: You = Wood.

trump_rub.name: Trump Rub
trump_rub.description: So called because it trumps all the other rubs in expense, flavour, and the ability to be extremely annoying (if you get it in your eye).

upgrade_card_craftybot_lesson.name: Craftybot Lesson Voucher
upgrade_card_craftybot_lesson.description: Reducing hours of brain-melting study for your Crafty-Bot, the Crafty-Bot Lesson Voucher contains special crib-note code facilitating the instant learning of one (1) skill.

upgrade_card_instant_resurrection.name: Get Out of Hell Free Card
upgrade_card_instant_resurrection.description: Escape from the underworld: instantly, with energy tank fully replenished and the soles of your feet barely scorched.

upgrade_card_reshuffle.name: Reshuffle Card
upgrade_card_reshuffle.description: If you don't like the hand fate has dealt you, fight for a new one. And so it is here, though for "fight" read "swap this card for", for "hand" read "Upgrade Cards". And apparently for "that first sentence" read "something entirely different with lots of different words in". Basically, you can swap this card for a free reshuffle of Upgrade Cards. Probably should have said that in the first place.

urfu.name: Urfu
urfu.description: A moist beige flaccid matter, imbued with the ability to suck up other flavours.

vegmageddon.name: Vegmageddon
vegmageddon.description: No rich urth-born root or brave brassica can survive the searing heat of a Pugilist Grill. It is a slow, vicious end for them. But justified, they say, in the name of 'Healthy Living'.

visiting_stone.name: Visiting Stone
visiting_stone.description: A confederate in the grand System of Stones and Rocks whose aim in life is to redistribute the Glitch here and there and make sure each has a chance to see each.

wall_segment.name: Wall Segment
wall_segment.description: On its own, it would just fall over. But among a house and other Wall Segments, it becomes the building block of home expansions. Useful for widening and adding floors to houses.

water_cooler.name: Water Cooler
water_cooler.description: Water dispensing devices do not get more generic than this. It is as plain as could be. Were it possible for water to be beige, beige this water would be.

watering_can.name: Watering Can
watering_can.description: A stainless-steel 5-gallon watering can. It can be used to water plants, trees, and crops.

wavy_gravy.name: Wavy Gravy
wavy_gravy.description: One pint of wavy gravy. It's so good, you'll eat it with a spoon.

white_gas.name: White Gas
white_gas.description: A vial of pristine white gas.

whortleberry_jelly.name: Whortleberry Jelly
whortleberry_jelly.description: One jar of homemade whortleberry jelly, made from the pulverized remains of a thousand quivering whortleberries.

wicked_bolognese_sauce.name: Wicked Bolognese Sauce
wicked_bolognese_sauce.description: A small jar of wicked bolognese sauce, on spaghetti or on its own for a meaty treat.

wine_of_the_dead.name: Wine of the Dead
wine_of_the_dead.description: A forbidding decanter filled with wine of the dead, made from grapes crushed in Purgatory. This Hade-licious drink will revive even the most pooped of hellions... but will kill all who drink it aboveground. Pour it on cultivated items in your home street or yard to unreap what you've sown. Beware its cursed powers!

wood.name: Wood
wood.description: A sturdy plank from a Wood Tree.

wood_post.name: Wood Post
wood_post.description: If you squint and look hard, you can almost see the joins where the Planks were put together to make Boards, and the Boards tirelessly hewn into a Post. But in its glorious finished form, you can't see the Planks for the Post. Or something.

wood_tree.name: Wood Tree
wood_tree.description: While all trees are woody, the Wood Tree is woodier than most. Tending to your wood is a rewarding solitary pursuit, but gathering friends to engorge your wood before all wielding your choppers simultaneously is both mutually satisfying, and sure to result in the injection of firm, tasty planks into your bag.

wood_tree_enchanted.name: Wood Tree
wood_tree_enchanted.description: While all trees are woody, the Wood Tree is woodier than most. Tending to your wood is a rewarding solitary pursuit, but gathering friends to engorge your wood before all wielding your choppers simultaneously is both mutually satisfying, and sure to result in the injection of firm, tasty planks into your bag.

woodworker.name: Woodworker
woodworker.description: How much wood would a Woodworker work if a Woodworker could work wood, you say? Glad you asked. It's four. Four Planks make a Board, four Boards a Post, four posts make a Beam. So how much wood would a Woodworker work if one could work wood? Four.

woodworker_chassis.name: Woodworker Chassis
woodworker_chassis.description: One of the four essential parts of the Woodworker, the chassis is essential in helping every upstanding wannabe woodworker gird their woodworkerly loin-parts and whittle their brown stuff into something wonderful.

woodworker_fuser.name: Woodworker Fuser
woodworker_fuser.description: The business end of the hardworking woodworking Woodworker, this is the bit that actually works the wood. Responsible for fusing planks into boards, boards into posts, posts into beams and dreams into reality (as long as you dream of wood).

yellow_crumb_flower.name: Yellow Crumb Flower
yellow_crumb_flower.description: Like having a tiny garden full of sunshine. How clever!

your_papers.name: Your Papers
your_papers.description: Here is a full yet incomplete set of all the papers a person might require in order that they may prove, justify or otherwise provide evidence that their papers are in order.

zillene.name: Zillene
zillene.description: A compound made out of green, blue and shiny.
